item.title: 怕了？中共批大罷免不好！藍白喊綠共變成辱共？中國網軍進駐Threads，結果翻車｜美烏礦產協議簽署！烏國入美保護傘｜粉紅特報125期
item.itunes:title: 怕了？中共批大罷免不好！藍白喊綠共變成辱共？中國網軍進駐Threads，結果翻車｜美烏礦產協議簽署！烏國入美保護傘｜粉紅特報125期
item.itunes:author: 波特王好帥
item.itunes:summary:
以下是影片的摘要：
影片開頭，講者波特先生，自稱是最好的反共投資顧問，更新了一個先前討論過的國際新聞故事。話說兩個月前，美國總統川普和烏克蘭總統澤倫斯基曾在眾人面前公開爭論，當時雙方原定簽署一份礦產協議，卻因此被擱置。在那次不愉快的結束後，川普告訴媒體，等澤倫斯基「準備好和平」時，他會回到談判桌。講者當時預言這份礦產協議最終會簽署，因為烏克蘭需要美國的幫助，不論是戰前的情資或戰後的實際援助，至今美國仍是援烏的最大來源，烏克蘭沒有不簽的本錢。對烏克蘭而言，這份協議不僅是美國的另一種保障，也是一種長期的健康關係，必須是互利的。簽署這份協議，也是在向俄羅斯傳遞一個訊息：美烏兩國的利益現在已經綁定。這也是當時川普為何如此自信的原因。畢竟是不同的國家，不可能永遠獲得免費援助，那樣不永續，無止盡花費美國納稅人的錢很難向公眾交代。
講者提到，還記得當時川普與澤倫斯基爭論時，歐盟的反應嗎？就在那一刻，他們真正意識到，如果美國真的停止幫助，烏克蘭淪陷，他們將是下一個。美國三年來不斷催促歐盟做得更多，直到川普上任大力推動，歐盟才感受到危機，於是大肆表演發聲表示全力支持烏克蘭。但兩個月過去，實質幫助有多少？講者說不需要多說，看看澤倫斯基的反應就知道了。他意識到沒有美國，那些歐盟的會議都是毫無意義的，因為歐盟一邊跟烏克蘭開會，一邊卻還在購買俄羅斯的天然氣，基本上等於在替俄羅斯續命，戰爭如何結束？一些歐盟政客空口說白話，馬克宏不斷說支持烏克蘭，也只是嘴上說說，他們確實有幫忙，但並不多，遠不如美國提供的援助。

礦產協議簽署及其意義


接著，影片提到一個機會出現了。美烏兩國領導人在教宗方濟各的葬禮上會面，他們找了個角落促膝長談，之後礦產協議便順利簽署了。講者分享一個小插曲，據說當時川普和澤倫斯基在葬禮上準備談話時，現場準備了三張椅子：給川普、澤倫斯基和馬克宏。但後來不知道川普說了什麼，馬克宏便離開了。當時外洩的影片片段沒有聲音，無法得知談話內容，但有網路上的讀唇專家分析指出，川普對馬克宏說：「你不該在這裡」，要他不要參加與澤倫斯基的會面，並說「我需要你幫個忙」，澤倫斯基則在一旁點頭。講者認為這個小插曲很有趣。
協議簽署後，美國財政部長史考特·貝森特在推特上發文表示，這份協議具有偉大的歷史意義。講者翻譯並分享了部分言論，指出這些話已經說得很清楚，甚至直接警告俄羅斯：美國企業正在投資烏克蘭，這不同於先前的援助，而是一種合資，是在告訴其他國家，烏克蘭的利益就是美國的利益，而且不是短期的，而是長期的互利。這份協議簽署後，美國從旁觀支持變成了準參與者，可視為烏克蘭正式進入美國的安全傘下。將來有美國企業在烏克蘭設點，有美國公民在當地，如果俄羅斯攻擊並造成損害，俄羅斯能脫得了干係嗎？講者認為不可能，否則美國財長不會刻意發布那樣的聲明。這基本上就是一種事先警告：如果俄羅斯繼續開戰不收手，將來美軍介入時，美國就有理由出兵了，可以說是要保護美國資產，甚至可能駐軍。
講者預料到此處可能會有人批評美國是趁人之危，但他指出，如果實際閱讀協議內容，會發現美國非常慷慨。協議清楚寫明，所有權、控制權、礦產開採權全部屬於烏克蘭，完全沒有烏克蘭「賣土地」或「送礦權」的問題。連在哪裡開採、開採什麼，都完全由烏克蘭決定，澤倫斯基的面子和尊重都給足了，這對烏克蘭公民和憲政體制也是一種莫大的安心感。簡單來說，烏克蘭出土地，美國出其他所有，烏克蘭獲得利潤和龐大工作機會，基本上算是被動收入。即使烏克蘭將來加入歐盟，美國也會尊重烏克蘭作為歐盟成員的義務，協議還可以修改。這類似於1948年援助歐洲的馬歇爾計畫，差別只在於如果礦產營運有獲利，美國能分到一份利潤。講者強調，這就是慷慨的程度，讓觀眾自行判斷。他認為，看到這份協議後，如果還有人說美國投機或不真誠，那就是胡說八道。這份協議最大的意義在於對和平和重建烏克蘭的承諾，所以與美國綁定利益是好事。就像最近台積電在美國設廠，台灣有些人在網路上鬼吼鬼叫說台積電被賣給美國，那些這樣想的人，講者認為很可憐、很悲哀，有腦子卻不用，真是浪費。

台灣的「綠共」抗議與假訊息問題


影片的後半段轉向台灣的時事，講者談到上週六，藍白陣營舉行的4月26日「反獨裁」遊行。他認為，單憑他們能夠走上街頭高喊「綠共下台」，就已經向台灣人民證明了台灣並非獨裁政體。然而，遊行後發生了一件出乎意料的溫馨小插曲，導致「綠共」這個詞突然在網路上消失了。在活動前，藍白陣營不斷高喊「綠共」，連中國的網軍也跟著應和，國民黨主席朱立倫也在自己的貼文中多次使用這個詞。但他們沒想到，使用這個詞其實也間接批評了中國共產黨，否則為何要用「共」來作為罵人的詞？他們就是這樣發明了「綠共」。雖然藍白支持者和網軍本意是罵民進黨，結果連中國共產黨也一起罵進去了。
接著發生了一件搞笑的事情。中天新聞在大陸防火牆內的微博上發文，引用朱立倫的「反綠共」言論，並批評台灣政府說：「人民的怒火，現在已在全台灣各地燃燒炸裂。」「如果這位獨裁者仍不願反省懺悔，終將被人民推翻剷除。」因為這則貼文提到了「獨裁者」並使用了「綠共」這個詞，間接罵到了中共，觸發了中國的審查系統。很快地，這則貼文就被系統刪除了。這個結果再次讓台灣人民看到，真正的獨裁政體是中國共產黨。後來，中時集團意識到不對勁，擔心他們的金主會生氣，於是趕快發布了一篇社論，表示「綠共」這個詞有邏輯上的謬誤。講者提到，常看他影片的觀眾應該看過很多次他回擊小粉紅，其中有些就經常喊「綠共」。但在這篇中時社論出現後，現在要看到有人使用這個詞已經困難很多了，因為中共不喜歡這個詞，他們的網軍也就不用了。當然，不是完全沒有，還是有一些真人網軍在使用，但比以前少很多。講者認為這沒關係，如果看到還有人使用這個詞，就把那篇中時社論傳給他們，告訴他們邏輯錯亂了。
講者總結，藍白陣營426遊行最大的成就，就是再次證明了：在民主國家，你可以批評民主；但在獨裁國家，你不能批評獨裁。他覺得這很感人。順帶一提，426活動結束後， Threads上突然出現一堆假的網軍帳號，試圖製造426遊行有很多人參加的假象。所有貼文的格式、排版一模一樣，講者認為這家網軍公司做事很敷衍，活動都結束兩天了他們才發文。而且他抓到了，有些假帳號反覆使用同一張照片。他舉例說明，一個假帳號使用了某張照片發文後，另一個假帳號竟然使用了前一個假帳號的同一張照片。講者認為這些網軍言論就像義和團復辟，很原始、很白痴，連腔調都帶著一股懷舊的臭味，很噁心。最後他提醒大家，台灣是亞洲第一大被假訊息攻擊的國家。現在有很多假帳號刻意發布有爭議的內容，試圖在留言區引發爭論，除了製造對立分化，他們也試圖導風向、洗白。而且不論你回覆什麼，那個假帳號背後的人根本不在乎，甚至回覆你的可能根本不是人，而是一個機器人。現在程式可以設定自動運作。所以如果看到大量重複的貼文或文字非常相似的內容，有87%的可能是網軍公司在作業。最好的方式就是直接封鎖，不要給他們。
================================================

Hello everyone, welcome back to this week's Pink News Bulletin. I'm your best anti-CCP investment advisor,. Mr. Potter. To begin today,. let me update you on. a follow-up to an international news story we previously discussed. That is, two months ago,. Trump and Zelensky. publicly argued in front of everyone. At that time, both sides had agreed. to sign a mineral agreement, but it was shelved. After that unpleasant ending,. Trump told the media. he’d return to the talks. when Zelensky was ready for peace. And as I said on the show before,. I believed this mineral deal. would eventually be signed. Because Ukraine needs U.S. help. Whether before the war started. when the U.S. provided intelligence,. or afterward when the U.S. provided actual aid,. and to this day,. the U.S. is still. the largest aid provider to Ukraine. Ukraine can't afford not to sign. It’s just a matter of how. Because it’s Ukraine that needs help. And if this mineral deal is signed,. it's another kind of guarantee from the U.S. to Ukraine. A long-term, healthy relationship. It has to be mutually beneficial. Signing it also sends a message to Russia—. the U.S. and Ukraine’s interests are now tied. That’s why Trump was so confident then. They’re different countries after all. You can't expect free help forever. Eventually, that’s not sustainable. Spending American taxpayers' money endlessly. is hard to justify to the public. And do you remember. what the EU’s reaction was when they argued? It was at that moment. that they truly realized—. if the U.S. really stops helping,. and Ukraine falls to Russia,. they’ll be next in line. The U.S. kept urging the EU to do more,. but they didn’t for three years. Until Trump came in and really pushed things,. then the EU finally felt a crisis. So they made a big show. of voicing full support for Ukraine. But two months later,. what actual help has there been? I don't even need to say it—. just look at Zelensky’s response. He realized that without the U.S.,. all those EU meetings are meaningless. Even while the EU is meeting with Ukraine,. they’re still buying gas from Russia. Basically keeping Russia alive. How can the war ever end? Some EU politicians are all talk. Macron keeps saying he supports Ukraine,. but it’s just talk. They help—. but not much.

Nowhere near what the U.S. provides. Finally, there was an opportunity. The U.S. and Ukraine. met at the funeral of Pope Francis. Their leaders had a chance to meet. They pulled up chairs in a corner and talked it out. And afterward, the mineral agreement was smoothly signed. By the way, when Trump and Zelensky. were about to talk at the funeral,. three chairs were prepared—. for Trump, Zelensky, and Macron. But we don't really know what Trump said afterward—. Macron left the scene. That leaked footage. had no audio at the time. So we don’t know what was said. But lip-reading experts online analyzed it—. Trump told Macron:. “You shouldn't be here.”. He told Macron. not to join the meeting with Zelensky. “I need a favor from you.”. “You shouldn't be here.”. Zelensky nodded beside him. I found that little episode. quite interesting. Just sharing with you. And after the two countries signed the agreement,. U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessant. posted on Twitter, saying. this deal is of great historical significance. And I translated part of his remarks. to share with you all. These remarks made things very clear. He even directly warned Russia,. saying American companies are investing in Ukraine. This is different from previous aid—. it’s a joint venture. It tells other countries:. Ukraine's interests are America's interests. And this isn't short-term—. it’s about long-term mutual benefit. After this deal was signed,. America went from just supporting from the sidelines. to becoming a quasi-participant. It can be seen as Ukraine. officially entering the U.S. security umbrella. In the future, with U.S. companies setting up in Ukraine,. and American citizens present—. if Russia attacks and causes harm,. would Russia get away with it? I don't think so. Otherwise, the U.S. Treasury Secretary. wouldn't have made that statement deliberately. It's essentially a warning upfront—. if Russia keeps fighting and refuses to stop,. then if the U.S. military joins in later,. America has a reason to send troops. They could say it's to protect U.S. assets. Stationing troops is even possible. But based on my experience,. at this point,. some little pinks will still. find something to criticize. They might say the U.S. is just taking advantage of the situation. But if you actually read the content of the agreement,. you'll see that the U.S. is being very generous. The agreement clearly states.

that ownership, control, and mining rights all belong to Ukraine. So there's no concern about Ukraine "selling land" or "giving away mining rights." Even where to mine. and what to mine. is entirely decided by Ukraine. Zelensky is given full face and respect. And this is also a major reassurance for Ukrainian citizens and their constitutional system. To put it plainly—. Ukraine provides the land,. the U.S. provides everything else. Ukraine gets profits. and massive job opportunities. It’s basically passive income. And if Ukraine joins the EU in the future,. the U.S. will also respect Ukraine's. obligations as an EU member. The agreement can be revised. It’s similar to the 1948. Marshall Plan that aided Europe,. just with one difference—. if the mining operation is profitable,. the U.S. gets a share of the profits. That’s how generous this is—I'll let you be the judge. After seeing this agreement,. if anyone still says. the U.S. is being opportunistic or insincere,. then they’re just full of nonsense. The biggest significance of this agreement. is the promise of peace. and rebuilding Ukraine. So tying interests to the U.S. is a good thing. Just like when TSMC set up a plant in the U.S. recently,. some people in Taiwan started shouting nonsense online—. not sure if they were just ignorant or pretending—. saying that TSMC was sold to the U.S. People who think like that—. pitiful. Sad. Having a brain but not using it—. what a waste. What a waste. So what do you think about these developments? Let me know in the comments below. And for the second half of today’s video,. I’d like to talk about. last Saturday—. the Blue-White Camp’s. April 26 “Anti-Dictatorship” protest. The very fact they could march the streets yelling “down with the Green CCP”. already proves to the Taiwanese people—. Taiwan is not a dictatorship. But unexpectedly, after the protest,. a heartwarming little episode occurred—. causing the term “Green CCP” to suddenly vanish online. Before the event, the Blue-White camp kept shouting “Green CCP.”. Even Chinese internet trolls echoed it. KMT chairman Eric Chu. also used the term repeatedly in his posts. But they didn't realize that by using this term,. they were also indirectly criticizing the Chinese Communist Party. Because otherwise, why use “CCP” as the insult? That’s how they coined “Green CCP.”. Even though Blue-White supporters and online trolls. meant to insult the DPP,. they ended up insulting the Chinese Communist Party too. And then something hilarious happened. CTI News posted on Weibo inside the Great Firewall,.

quoting KMT Chairman Eric Chu’s anti-Green CCP remarks,. and criticizing the Taiwanese government, saying:. “The people’s anger. is now erupting across every corner of Taiwan.”. “If this dictator refuses to reflect and repent,. the people will eventually overthrow and remove him.”. Because this post mentioned a "dictator" and used the term “Green CCP,”. it indirectly insulted the CCP. It triggered China’s censorship system. Soon after, the post was removed by the system. This outcome once again. shows the people of Taiwan. that the real dictatorship is the CCP. Later, the China Times sensed trouble,. worried their backers would be angry. So they quickly published an editorial saying—. “The term Green CCP is logically flawed.”. Regular viewers of Mr. Porter’s videos. should’ve seen plenty of times. when I clap back at little pinks—. some of them always shout “Green CCP.”. But after that China Times editorial appeared,. it’s now much harder. to see that term being used. Because the CCP dislikes it—. their trolls stopped using it. Of course, it's not entirely gone. Some real human trolls still use it,. but much less than before. But that’s okay—. if you see someone still using that term,. just send them that China Times editorial,. and say they’re logically confused. The biggest achievement of the Blue-White camp's 426 protest. was once again proving that—. in a democracy, you can criticize democracy. But in a dictatorship, you can’t criticize dictatorship. How touching. Oh, by the way—. after the 426 event ended,. a bunch of fake troll accounts suddenly appeared on Threads,. trying to create the illusion that many people had joined the 426 protest. All the posts had the exact same formatting and layout. This troll company really is sloppy. The event was already over for two days when they posted. And I caught them—. some fake accounts used the same photos repeatedly. Take this fake account—look closely:. zhangchao5047. After stealing a photo and posting it,. another fake account, yingying0155,. used the same exact photo from the previous account. These troll comments. are like a revival of the Boxer Rebellion—. primitive,. and idiotic. Even the tone carries a nostalgic stink. Gross. A reminder to everyone—. Taiwan ranks number one in Asia. for being attacked by disinformation. Many fake accounts today. intentionally post controversial content. to spark arguments in the comments. Besides creating division,. they also try to steer narratives and whitewash. And whatever you reply—.

the person behind that fake account. doesn't even care. In fact, the one replying to you. might not even be a person—. it could be a bot. Programs can now be set. to run automatically. So if you see tons of duplicate posts. or suspiciously similar copy,. 87% chance it's troll farms at work. Best to block them immediately—. don’t give them traffic. Also, Taiwan’s mass recall campaigns. are still ongoing. Many places have already met the signature threshold. But it's not over yet. Not until those CCP agents are recalled. and pro-China legislators are removed—. that’s when it’s complete. If the recall goes smoothly,. we can weaken the CCP’s influence in Taiwan. That’s why even the CCP mouthpiece, China Youth Daily,. has started attacking Taiwan’s recall movement. They even published an article saying the recall is bad for Taiwan. My friends—. if the CCP’s state media says that,. it means this recall movement. is absolutely good for Taiwan. The CCP is Taiwan’s enemy. Whatever the enemy dislikes—. we keep doing it. And to wrap up today’s video—. here are some headshot comments from my channel. “I’m from mainland China. Although I oppose your stance on the Taiwan issue,. I still thank you. You’ve helped many mainlanders awaken after watching your videos. I hope your videos can awaken even more people in China.”. Awesome! Another little pink has been successfully awakened by my video. Gratified. Moved. But you’re not fully awake yet. I respect you now—. because you’re halfway awake. So now I’ll call you a “Chinese netizen.”. Let me remind you—. The reason you oppose Taiwan's position. is because you're still holding onto unification ideology. And that ideology. was planted by. the CCP as a toxic legacy in your mind. Only when you truly accept that. the CCP has never ruled Taiwan for even one day,. and that Taiwan's future should be decided by Taiwanese people—. not by people from China—. will things be clear to you. This isn’t an attack—it’s the truth outside your firewall. Those textbooks in elementary school saying “Beautiful Treasure Island Taiwan”—. that was CCP brainwashing. It made you think Taiwan belongs to the PRC. But that's just not true. Just like now—you're halfway awake. The CCP claims to represent the Chinese people,. and says "without the Party, there's no new China." But you don’t believe that anymore, right? Same thing applies here. You’ve figured that part out.

You’ve awakened. And the Taiwan issue is no different. You need to get that straight too. But still—congrats. I hope the seed of democracy I planted. keeps growing strong inside your heart. Become a righteous and unapologetic bastard. Alright then. Looks like you’ve already made it. You bastard. Here’s a joke:. “Trump also said he wants to be a dictator.”. So who are you choosing now—the CCP or the 'American CCP'? At worst, Trump just likes to talk crap. But the CCP literally runs tanks over people. Is that even a real choice? Has the U.S. ever forced Taiwan to call themselves Americans? I’m not even sure Trump actually said he wanted to be a dictator. You might be misquoting him. Even if Trump did make some exaggerated or joking comment. like “I want to be a dictator,”. the U.S. system. is still a sound democracy. Just because he says it doesn’t mean he can do it. The CCP, on the other hand, is a real dictatorship. It has no structural checks. America has democratic institutions,. with elections, opposition parties, and a free press. A U.S. president can be criticized, impeached, or recalled. And the CCP? You hold up a blank piece of paper and you get disappeared. How do you even compare the two? “American CCP”? Seriously? What kind of illogical term is that? I just love watching little frogs panic. Please stop typing comments. while staring at yourself in the mirror. You’re the one actually living in the well. Did you forget that just to comment here,. you had to bypass the firewall? “Porter King, you say you oppose the CCP,. but you’re actually pro-CCP and selling out Taiwan!”. Huh? Let me clarify one thing first—. Did you get the wrong guy? Did you mix up Porter King with “Bitcoin King”? What exactly have I done to be called pro-CCP? Did I push any pro-China bills in the legislature? Did I make shows that whitewash or spread CCP lies? Have you even watched my videos? All I do is expose the bad things the CCP has done,. and warn Taiwanese people not to fall for cognitive warfare. That’s selling out? Let me flip the question. To sell out Taiwan—. means you profit from it, right? Like money or favors? But look at me—exposing CCP operations,. leaking United Front plans early,. disrupting their agendas. If I can still get red money from the CCP. for doing that—. that’d be amazing! If that kind of deal exists,. I’d be uploading daily. If you think this makes money—. come join me! Let’s pursue the freedom to roast the CCP together.

I’ve said it many times—. The whole Mr. Porter character. was created because of this. Mr. Porter welcomes you. to walk the anti-CCP path. You can be “Teacher Junyong.”. Let’s promote anti-CCP resistance together. I’m more curious—. How much DPP funding do you think I got? Why does being anti-CCP. automatically mean I’m funded by the DPP? The meaning behind your words—. isn’t it basically saying. KMT and TPP don’t oppose the CCP? If we follow your broken logic,. why don’t you ask all those. pro-CCP or silent influencers. if they’re getting KMT or TPP money? I oppose the CCP because I identify as Taiwanese. I’m not doing this for the DPP. It’s because I don’t want the CCP to successfully infiltrate. That’s why I call on everyone to resist the CCP. If you can't respond to what I actually said in the video,. then all you can do is throw out random accusations. Saying I got paid, huh? Paid where, exactly? Even when I went to Taipei to speak at the mass recall rally,. I paid out of my own pocket. That was ordinary people voluntarily standing up. If you have proof I got paid—. go ahead, expose it to the media, I support that. But if you’ve got no evidence—. then maybe you’re the one getting paid. Why else would that idea pop into your head? You’re just used to getting paid. That’s why whenever someone disagrees with you,. you assume they’re paid too. "Tag a Taiwan independence criminal sentenced to death." Being called pro-independence? I’m honored. Typical Little Pink behavior:. Living like a prisoner themselves,. yet still rushing to sentence others to death. Taiwan independence isn’t dead—. but the CCP might be soon. Let’s see who lasts longer. Also, if you’re tagging me,. that means I’m on your mind. Even though I honestly don’t care about you. Little Pink, to me,. you’re just a joke sent to be dunked on. In real life, I’m doing just fine in Taiwan. You’re stuck inside the firewall,. working 996,. fantasizing about Five Togethers. With your $450 monthly salary,. you barely have any rest time—. and you still live under the risk of forced organ harvesting. Even in such miserable conditions,. you still make time to comment on my videos. Still following what I’m up to. That’s not tagging—. that’s a crush. Seriously. That’s it for today’s video. If you liked it, please like and subscribe. You’re also welcome to join my YouTube membership. to support this series.

I’m Potter King. See you in the next video. Bye!

item.description:
以下是影片的摘要：
影片開頭，講者波特先生，自稱是最好的反共投資顧問，更新了一個先前討論過的國際新聞故事。話說兩個月前，美國總統川普和烏克蘭總統澤倫斯基曾在眾人面前公開爭論，當時雙方原定簽署一份礦產協議，卻因此被擱置。在那次不愉快的結束後，川普告訴媒體，等澤倫斯基「準備好和平」時，他會回到談判桌。講者當時預言這份礦產協議最終會簽署，因為烏克蘭需要美國的幫助，不論是戰前的情資或戰後的實際援助，至今美國仍是援烏的最大來源，烏克蘭沒有不簽的本錢。對烏克蘭而言，這份協議不僅是美國的另一種保障，也是一種長期的健康關係，必須是互利的。簽署這份協議，也是在向俄羅斯傳遞一個訊息：美烏兩國的利益現在已經綁定。這也是當時川普為何如此自信的原因。畢竟是不同的國家，不可能永遠獲得免費援助，那樣不永續，無止盡花費美國納稅人的錢很難向公眾交代。
講者提到，還記得當時川普與澤倫斯基爭論時，歐盟的反應嗎？就在那一刻，他們真正意識到，如果美國真的停止幫助，烏克蘭淪陷，他們將是下一個。美國三年來不斷催促歐盟做得更多，直到川普上任大力推動，歐盟才感受到危機，於是大肆表演發聲表示全力支持烏克蘭。但兩個月過去，實質幫助有多少？講者說不需要多說，看看澤倫斯基的反應就知道了。他意識到沒有美國，那些歐盟的會議都是毫無意義的，因為歐盟一邊跟烏克蘭開會，一邊卻還在購買俄羅斯的天然氣，基本上等於在替俄羅斯續命，戰爭如何結束？一些歐盟政客空口說白話，馬克宏不斷說支持烏克蘭，也只是嘴上說說，他們確實有幫忙，但並不多，遠不如美國提供的援助。

礦產協議簽署及其意義


接著，影片提到一個機會出現了。美烏兩國領導人在教宗方濟各的葬禮上會面，他們找了個角落促膝長談，之後礦產協議便順利簽署了。講者分享一個小插曲，據說當時川普和澤倫斯基在葬禮上準備談話時，現場準備了三張椅子：給川普、澤倫斯基和馬克宏。但後來不知道川普說了什麼，馬克宏便離開了。當時外洩的影片片段沒有聲音，無法得知談話內容，但有網路上的讀唇專家分析指出，川普對馬克宏說：「你不該在這裡」，要他不要參加與澤倫斯基的會面，並說「我需要你幫個忙」，澤倫斯基則在一旁點頭。講者認為這個小插曲很有趣。
協議簽署後，美國財政部長史考特·貝森特在推特上發文表示，這份協議具有偉大的歷史意義。講者翻譯並分享了部分言論，指出這些話已經說得很清楚，甚至直接警告俄羅斯：美國企業正在投資烏克蘭，這不同於先前的援助，而是一種合資，是在告訴其他國家，烏克蘭的利益就是美國的利益，而且不是短期的，而是長期的互利。這份協議簽署後，美國從旁觀支持變成了準參與者，可視為烏克蘭正式進入美國的安全傘下。將來有美國企業在烏克蘭設點，有美國公民在當地，如果俄羅斯攻擊並造成損害，俄羅斯能脫得了干係嗎？講者認為不可能，否則美國財長不會刻意發布那樣的聲明。這基本上就是一種事先警告：如果俄羅斯繼續開戰不收手，將來美軍介入時，美國就有理由出兵了，可以說是要保護美國資產，甚至可能駐軍。
講者預料到此處可能會有人批評美國是趁人之危，但他指出，如果實際閱讀協議內容，會發現美國非常慷慨。協議清楚寫明，所有權、控制權、礦產開採權全部屬於烏克蘭，完全沒有烏克蘭「賣土地」或「送礦權」的問題。連在哪裡開採、開採什麼，都完全由烏克蘭決定，澤倫斯基的面子和尊重都給足了，這對烏克蘭公民和憲政體制也是一種莫大的安心感。簡單來說，烏克蘭出土地，美國出其他所有，烏克蘭獲得利潤和龐大工作機會，基本上算是被動收入。即使烏克蘭將來加入歐盟，美國也會尊重烏克蘭作為歐盟成員的義務，協議還可以修改。這類似於1948年援助歐洲的馬歇爾計畫，差別只在於如果礦產營運有獲利，美國能分到一份利潤。講者強調，這就是慷慨的程度，讓觀眾自行判斷。他認為，看到這份協議後，如果還有人說美國投機或不真誠，那就是胡說八道。這份協議最大的意義在於對和平和重建烏克蘭的承諾，所以與美國綁定利益是好事。就像最近台積電在美國設廠，台灣有些人在網路上鬼吼鬼叫說台積電被賣給美國，那些這樣想的人，講者認為很可憐、很悲哀，有腦子卻不用，真是浪費。

台灣的「綠共」抗議與假訊息問題


影片的後半段轉向台灣的時事，講者談到上週六，藍白陣營舉行的4月26日「反獨裁」遊行。他認為，單憑他們能夠走上街頭高喊「綠共下台」，就已經向台灣人民證明了台灣並非獨裁政體。然而，遊行後發生了一件出乎意料的溫馨小插曲，導致「綠共」這個詞突然在網路上消失了。在活動前，藍白陣營不斷高喊「綠共」，連中國的網軍也跟著應和，國民黨主席朱立倫也在自己的貼文中多次使用這個詞。但他們沒想到，使用這個詞其實也間接批評了中國共產黨，否則為何要用「共」來作為罵人的詞？他們就是這樣發明了「綠共」。雖然藍白支持者和網軍本意是罵民進黨，結果連中國共產黨也一起罵進去了。
接著發生了一件搞笑的事情。中天新聞在大陸防火牆內的微博上發文，引用朱立倫的「反綠共」言論，並批評台灣政府說：「人民的怒火，現在已在全台灣各地燃燒炸裂。」「如果這位獨裁者仍不願反省懺悔，終將被人民推翻剷除。」因為這則貼文提到了「獨裁者」並使用了「綠共」這個詞，間接罵到了中共，觸發了中國的審查系統。很快地，這則貼文就被系統刪除了。這個結果再次讓台灣人民看到，真正的獨裁政體是中國共產黨。後來，中時集團意識到不對勁，擔心他們的金主會生氣，於是趕快發布了一篇社論，表示「綠共」這個詞有邏輯上的謬誤。講者提到，常看他影片的觀眾應該看過很多次他回擊小粉紅，其中有些就經常喊「綠共」。但在這篇中時社論出現後，現在要看到有人使用這個詞已經困難很多了，因為中共不喜歡這個詞，他們的網軍也就不用了。當然，不是完全沒有，還是有一些真人網軍在使用，但比以前少很多。講者認為這沒關係，如果看到還有人使用這個詞，就把那篇中時社論傳給他們，告訴他們邏輯錯亂了。
講者總結，藍白陣營426遊行最大的成就，就是再次證明了：在民主國家，你可以批評民主；但在獨裁國家，你不能批評獨裁。他覺得這很感人。順帶一提，426活動結束後， Threads上突然出現一堆假的網軍帳號，試圖製造426遊行有很多人參加的假象。所有貼文的格式、排版一模一樣，講者認為這家網軍公司做事很敷衍，活動都結束兩天了他們才發文。而且他抓到了，有些假帳號反覆使用同一張照片。他舉例說明，一個假帳號使用了某張照片發文後，另一個假帳號竟然使用了前一個假帳號的同一張照片。講者認為這些網軍言論就像義和團復辟，很原始、很白痴，連腔調都帶著一股懷舊的臭味，很噁心。最後他提醒大家，台灣是亞洲第一大被假訊息攻擊的國家。現在有很多假帳號刻意發布有爭議的內容，試圖在留言區引發爭論，除了製造對立分化，他們也試圖導風向、洗白。而且不論你回覆什麼，那個假帳號背後的人根本不在乎，甚至回覆你的可能根本不是人，而是一個機器人。現在程式可以設定自動運作。所以如果看到大量重複的貼文或文字非常相似的內容，有87%的可能是網軍公司在作業。最好的方式就是直接封鎖，不要給他們。
================================================

Hello everyone, welcome back to this week's Pink News Bulletin. I'm your best anti-CCP investment advisor,. Mr. Potter. To begin today,. let me update you on. a follow-up to an international news story we previously discussed. That is, two months ago,. Trump and Zelensky. publicly argued in front of everyone. At that time, both sides had agreed. to sign a mineral agreement, but it was shelved. After that unpleasant ending,. Trump told the media. he’d return to the talks. when Zelensky was ready for peace. And as I said on the show before,. I believed this mineral deal. would eventually be signed. Because Ukraine needs U.S. help. Whether before the war started. when the U.S. provided intelligence,. or afterward when the U.S. provided actual aid,. and to this day,. the U.S. is still. the largest aid provider to Ukraine. Ukraine can't afford not to sign. It’s just a matter of how. Because it’s Ukraine that needs help. And if this mineral deal is signed,. it's another kind of guarantee from the U.S. to Ukraine. A long-term, healthy relationship. It has to be mutually beneficial. Signing it also sends a message to Russia—. the U.S. and Ukraine’s interests are now tied. That’s why Trump was so confident then. They’re different countries after all. You can't expect free help forever. Eventually, that’s not sustainable. Spending American taxpayers' money endlessly. is hard to justify to the public. And do you remember. what the EU’s reaction was when they argued? It was at that moment. that they truly realized—. if the U.S. really stops helping,. and Ukraine falls to Russia,. they’ll be next in line. The U.S. kept urging the EU to do more,. but they didn’t for three years. Until Trump came in and really pushed things,. then the EU finally felt a crisis. So they made a big show. of voicing full support for Ukraine. But two months later,. what actual help has there been? I don't even need to say it—. just look at Zelensky’s response. He realized that without the U.S.,. all those EU meetings are meaningless. Even while the EU is meeting with Ukraine,. they’re still buying gas from Russia. Basically keeping Russia alive. How can the war ever end? Some EU politicians are all talk. Macron keeps saying he supports Ukraine,. but it’s just talk. They help—. but not much.

Nowhere near what the U.S. provides. Finally, there was an opportunity. The U.S. and Ukraine. met at the funeral of Pope Francis. Their leaders had a chance to meet. They pulled up chairs in a corner and talked it out. And afterward, the mineral agreement was smoothly signed. By the way, when Trump and Zelensky. were about to talk at the funeral,. three chairs were prepared—. for Trump, Zelensky, and Macron. But we don't really know what Trump said afterward—. Macron left the scene. That leaked footage. had no audio at the time. So we don’t know what was said. But lip-reading experts online analyzed it—. Trump told Macron:. “You shouldn't be here.”. He told Macron. not to join the meeting with Zelensky. “I need a favor from you.”. “You shouldn't be here.”. Zelensky nodded beside him. I found that little episode. quite interesting. Just sharing with you. And after the two countries signed the agreement,. U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessant. posted on Twitter, saying. this deal is of great historical significance. And I translated part of his remarks. to share with you all. These remarks made things very clear. He even directly warned Russia,. saying American companies are investing in Ukraine. This is different from previous aid—. it’s a joint venture. It tells other countries:. Ukraine's interests are America's interests. And this isn't short-term—. it’s about long-term mutual benefit. After this deal was signed,. America went from just supporting from the sidelines. to becoming a quasi-participant. It can be seen as Ukraine. officially entering the U.S. security umbrella. In the future, with U.S. companies setting up in Ukraine,. and American citizens present—. if Russia attacks and causes harm,. would Russia get away with it? I don't think so. Otherwise, the U.S. Treasury Secretary. wouldn't have made that statement deliberately. It's essentially a warning upfront—. if Russia keeps fighting and refuses to stop,. then if the U.S. military joins in later,. America has a reason to send troops. They could say it's to protect U.S. assets. Stationing troops is even possible. But based on my experience,. at this point,. some little pinks will still. find something to criticize. They might say the U.S. is just taking advantage of the situation. But if you actually read the content of the agreement,. you'll see that the U.S. is being very generous. The agreement clearly states.

that ownership, control, and mining rights all belong to Ukraine. So there's no concern about Ukraine "selling land" or "giving away mining rights." Even where to mine. and what to mine. is entirely decided by Ukraine. Zelensky is given full face and respect. And this is also a major reassurance for Ukrainian citizens and their constitutional system. To put it plainly—. Ukraine provides the land,. the U.S. provides everything else. Ukraine gets profits. and massive job opportunities. It’s basically passive income. And if Ukraine joins the EU in the future,. the U.S. will also respect Ukraine's. obligations as an EU member. The agreement can be revised. It’s similar to the 1948. Marshall Plan that aided Europe,. just with one difference—. if the mining operation is profitable,. the U.S. gets a share of the profits. That’s how generous this is—I'll let you be the judge. After seeing this agreement,. if anyone still says. the U.S. is being opportunistic or insincere,. then they’re just full of nonsense. The biggest significance of this agreement. is the promise of peace. and rebuilding Ukraine. So tying interests to the U.S. is a good thing. Just like when TSMC set up a plant in the U.S. recently,. some people in Taiwan started shouting nonsense online—. not sure if they were just ignorant or pretending—. saying that TSMC was sold to the U.S. People who think like that—. pitiful. Sad. Having a brain but not using it—. what a waste. What a waste. So what do you think about these developments? Let me know in the comments below. And for the second half of today’s video,. I’d like to talk about. last Saturday—. the Blue-White Camp’s. April 26 “Anti-Dictatorship” protest. The very fact they could march the streets yelling “down with the Green CCP”. already proves to the Taiwanese people—. Taiwan is not a dictatorship. But unexpectedly, after the protest,. a heartwarming little episode occurred—. causing the term “Green CCP” to suddenly vanish online. Before the event, the Blue-White camp kept shouting “Green CCP.”. Even Chinese internet trolls echoed it. KMT chairman Eric Chu. also used the term repeatedly in his posts. But they didn't realize that by using this term,. they were also indirectly criticizing the Chinese Communist Party. Because otherwise, why use “CCP” as the insult? That’s how they coined “Green CCP.”. Even though Blue-White supporters and online trolls. meant to insult the DPP,. they ended up insulting the Chinese Communist Party too. And then something hilarious happened. CTI News posted on Weibo inside the Great Firewall,.

quoting KMT Chairman Eric Chu’s anti-Green CCP remarks,. and criticizing the Taiwanese government, saying:. “The people’s anger. is now erupting across every corner of Taiwan.”. “If this dictator refuses to reflect and repent,. the people will eventually overthrow and remove him.”. Because this post mentioned a "dictator" and used the term “Green CCP,”. it indirectly insulted the CCP. It triggered China’s censorship system. Soon after, the post was removed by the system. This outcome once again. shows the people of Taiwan. that the real dictatorship is the CCP. Later, the China Times sensed trouble,. worried their backers would be angry. So they quickly published an editorial saying—. “The term Green CCP is logically flawed.”. Regular viewers of Mr. Porter’s videos. should’ve seen plenty of times. when I clap back at little pinks—. some of them always shout “Green CCP.”. But after that China Times editorial appeared,. it’s now much harder. to see that term being used. Because the CCP dislikes it—. their trolls stopped using it. Of course, it's not entirely gone. Some real human trolls still use it,. but much less than before. But that’s okay—. if you see someone still using that term,. just send them that China Times editorial,. and say they’re logically confused. The biggest achievement of the Blue-White camp's 426 protest. was once again proving that—. in a democracy, you can criticize democracy. But in a dictatorship, you can’t criticize dictatorship. How touching. Oh, by the way—. after the 426 event ended,. a bunch of fake troll accounts suddenly appeared on Threads,. trying to create the illusion that many people had joined the 426 protest. All the posts had the exact same formatting and layout. This troll company really is sloppy. The event was already over for two days when they posted. And I caught them—. some fake accounts used the same photos repeatedly. Take this fake account—look closely:. zhangchao5047. After stealing a photo and posting it,. another fake account, yingying0155,. used the same exact photo from the previous account. These troll comments. are like a revival of the Boxer Rebellion—. primitive,. and idiotic. Even the tone carries a nostalgic stink. Gross. A reminder to everyone—. Taiwan ranks number one in Asia. for being attacked by disinformation. Many fake accounts today. intentionally post controversial content. to spark arguments in the comments. Besides creating division,. they also try to steer narratives and whitewash. And whatever you reply—.

the person behind that fake account. doesn't even care. In fact, the one replying to you. might not even be a person—. it could be a bot. Programs can now be set. to run automatically. So if you see tons of duplicate posts. or suspiciously similar copy,. 87% chance it's troll farms at work. Best to block them immediately—. don’t give them traffic. Also, Taiwan’s mass recall campaigns. are still ongoing. Many places have already met the signature threshold. But it's not over yet. Not until those CCP agents are recalled. and pro-China legislators are removed—. that’s when it’s complete. If the recall goes smoothly,. we can weaken the CCP’s influence in Taiwan. That’s why even the CCP mouthpiece, China Youth Daily,. has started attacking Taiwan’s recall movement. They even published an article saying the recall is bad for Taiwan. My friends—. if the CCP’s state media says that,. it means this recall movement. is absolutely good for Taiwan. The CCP is Taiwan’s enemy. Whatever the enemy dislikes—. we keep doing it. And to wrap up today’s video—. here are some headshot comments from my channel. “I’m from mainland China. Although I oppose your stance on the Taiwan issue,. I still thank you. You’ve helped many mainlanders awaken after watching your videos. I hope your videos can awaken even more people in China.”. Awesome! Another little pink has been successfully awakened by my video. Gratified. Moved. But you’re not fully awake yet. I respect you now—. because you’re halfway awake. So now I’ll call you a “Chinese netizen.”. Let me remind you—. The reason you oppose Taiwan's position. is because you're still holding onto unification ideology. And that ideology. was planted by. the CCP as a toxic legacy in your mind. Only when you truly accept that. the CCP has never ruled Taiwan for even one day,. and that Taiwan's future should be decided by Taiwanese people—. not by people from China—. will things be clear to you. This isn’t an attack—it’s the truth outside your firewall. Those textbooks in elementary school saying “Beautiful Treasure Island Taiwan”—. that was CCP brainwashing. It made you think Taiwan belongs to the PRC. But that's just not true. Just like now—you're halfway awake. The CCP claims to represent the Chinese people,. and says "without the Party, there's no new China." But you don’t believe that anymore, right? Same thing applies here. You’ve figured that part out.

You’ve awakened. And the Taiwan issue is no different. You need to get that straight too. But still—congrats. I hope the seed of democracy I planted. keeps growing strong inside your heart. Become a righteous and unapologetic bastard. Alright then. Looks like you’ve already made it. You bastard. Here’s a joke:. “Trump also said he wants to be a dictator.”. So who are you choosing now—the CCP or the 'American CCP'? At worst, Trump just likes to talk crap. But the CCP literally runs tanks over people. Is that even a real choice? Has the U.S. ever forced Taiwan to call themselves Americans? I’m not even sure Trump actually said he wanted to be a dictator. You might be misquoting him. Even if Trump did make some exaggerated or joking comment. like “I want to be a dictator,”. the U.S. system. is still a sound democracy. Just because he says it doesn’t mean he can do it. The CCP, on the other hand, is a real dictatorship. It has no structural checks. America has democratic institutions,. with elections, opposition parties, and a free press. A U.S. president can be criticized, impeached, or recalled. And the CCP? You hold up a blank piece of paper and you get disappeared. How do you even compare the two? “American CCP”? Seriously? What kind of illogical term is that? I just love watching little frogs panic. Please stop typing comments. while staring at yourself in the mirror. You’re the one actually living in the well. Did you forget that just to comment here,. you had to bypass the firewall? “Porter King, you say you oppose the CCP,. but you’re actually pro-CCP and selling out Taiwan!”. Huh? Let me clarify one thing first—. Did you get the wrong guy? Did you mix up Porter King with “Bitcoin King”? What exactly have I done to be called pro-CCP? Did I push any pro-China bills in the legislature? Did I make shows that whitewash or spread CCP lies? Have you even watched my videos? All I do is expose the bad things the CCP has done,. and warn Taiwanese people not to fall for cognitive warfare. That’s selling out? Let me flip the question. To sell out Taiwan—. means you profit from it, right? Like money or favors? But look at me—exposing CCP operations,. leaking United Front plans early,. disrupting their agendas. If I can still get red money from the CCP. for doing that—. that’d be amazing! If that kind of deal exists,. I’d be uploading daily. If you think this makes money—. come join me! Let’s pursue the freedom to roast the CCP together.

I’ve said it many times—. The whole Mr. Porter character. was created because of this. Mr. Porter welcomes you. to walk the anti-CCP path. You can be “Teacher Junyong.”. Let’s promote anti-CCP resistance together. I’m more curious—. How much DPP funding do you think I got? Why does being anti-CCP. automatically mean I’m funded by the DPP? The meaning behind your words—. isn’t it basically saying. KMT and TPP don’t oppose the CCP? If we follow your broken logic,. why don’t you ask all those. pro-CCP or silent influencers. if they’re getting KMT or TPP money? I oppose the CCP because I identify as Taiwanese. I’m not doing this for the DPP. It’s because I don’t want the CCP to successfully infiltrate. That’s why I call on everyone to resist the CCP. If you can't respond to what I actually said in the video,. then all you can do is throw out random accusations. Saying I got paid, huh? Paid where, exactly? Even when I went to Taipei to speak at the mass recall rally,. I paid out of my own pocket. That was ordinary people voluntarily standing up. If you have proof I got paid—. go ahead, expose it to the media, I support that. But if you’ve got no evidence—. then maybe you’re the one getting paid. Why else would that idea pop into your head? You’re just used to getting paid. That’s why whenever someone disagrees with you,. you assume they’re paid too. "Tag a Taiwan independence criminal sentenced to death." Being called pro-independence? I’m honored. Typical Little Pink behavior:. Living like a prisoner themselves,. yet still rushing to sentence others to death. Taiwan independence isn’t dead—. but the CCP might be soon. Let’s see who lasts longer. Also, if you’re tagging me,. that means I’m on your mind. Even though I honestly don’t care about you. Little Pink, to me,. you’re just a joke sent to be dunked on. In real life, I’m doing just fine in Taiwan. You’re stuck inside the firewall,. working 996,. fantasizing about Five Togethers. With your $450 monthly salary,. you barely have any rest time—. and you still live under the risk of forced organ harvesting. Even in such miserable conditions,. you still make time to comment on my videos. Still following what I’m up to. That’s not tagging—. that’s a crush. Seriously. That’s it for today’s video. If you liked it, please like and subscribe. You’re also welcome to join my YouTube membership. to support this series.

I’m Potter King. See you in the next video. Bye!

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OjjruMXPcck

點連結成為我的Youtube頻道會員：https://goo.gl/MFNUKr

怕了？中共批大罷免不好！藍白喊綠共變成辱共？

中國網軍進駐Threads，結果全翻車！

美烏礦產協議簽署！烏國入美保護傘

粉紅特報125期

追蹤我IG：

https://www.instagram.com/potterking712/

追蹤我Threads：

https://www.threads.net/@potterking712

追蹤我臉書粉專：

item.content:encoded:
以下是影片的摘要：
影片開頭，講者波特先生，自稱是最好的反共投資顧問，更新了一個先前討論過的國際新聞故事。話說兩個月前，美國總統川普和烏克蘭總統澤倫斯基曾在眾人面前公開爭論，當時雙方原定簽署一份礦產協議，卻因此被擱置。在那次不愉快的結束後，川普告訴媒體，等澤倫斯基「準備好和平」時，他會回到談判桌。講者當時預言這份礦產協議最終會簽署，因為烏克蘭需要美國的幫助，不論是戰前的情資或戰後的實際援助，至今美國仍是援烏的最大來源，烏克蘭沒有不簽的本錢。對烏克蘭而言，這份協議不僅是美國的另一種保障，也是一種長期的健康關係，必須是互利的。簽署這份協議，也是在向俄羅斯傳遞一個訊息：美烏兩國的利益現在已經綁定。這也是當時川普為何如此自信的原因。畢竟是不同的國家，不可能永遠獲得免費援助，那樣不永續，無止盡花費美國納稅人的錢很難向公眾交代。
講者提到，還記得當時川普與澤倫斯基爭論時，歐盟的反應嗎？就在那一刻，他們真正意識到，如果美國真的停止幫助，烏克蘭淪陷，他們將是下一個。美國三年來不斷催促歐盟做得更多，直到川普上任大力推動，歐盟才感受到危機，於是大肆表演發聲表示全力支持烏克蘭。但兩個月過去，實質幫助有多少？講者說不需要多說，看看澤倫斯基的反應就知道了。他意識到沒有美國，那些歐盟的會議都是毫無意義的，因為歐盟一邊跟烏克蘭開會，一邊卻還在購買俄羅斯的天然氣，基本上等於在替俄羅斯續命，戰爭如何結束？一些歐盟政客空口說白話，馬克宏不斷說支持烏克蘭，也只是嘴上說說，他們確實有幫忙，但並不多，遠不如美國提供的援助。

礦產協議簽署及其意義


接著，影片提到一個機會出現了。美烏兩國領導人在教宗方濟各的葬禮上會面，他們找了個角落促膝長談，之後礦產協議便順利簽署了。講者分享一個小插曲，據說當時川普和澤倫斯基在葬禮上準備談話時，現場準備了三張椅子：給川普、澤倫斯基和馬克宏。但後來不知道川普說了什麼，馬克宏便離開了。當時外洩的影片片段沒有聲音，無法得知談話內容，但有網路上的讀唇專家分析指出，川普對馬克宏說：「你不該在這裡」，要他不要參加與澤倫斯基的會面，並說「我需要你幫個忙」，澤倫斯基則在一旁點頭。講者認為這個小插曲很有趣。
協議簽署後，美國財政部長史考特·貝森特在推特上發文表示，這份協議具有偉大的歷史意義。講者翻譯並分享了部分言論，指出這些話已經說得很清楚，甚至直接警告俄羅斯：美國企業正在投資烏克蘭，這不同於先前的援助，而是一種合資，是在告訴其他國家，烏克蘭的利益就是美國的利益，而且不是短期的，而是長期的互利。這份協議簽署後，美國從旁觀支持變成了準參與者，可視為烏克蘭正式進入美國的安全傘下。將來有美國企業在烏克蘭設點，有美國公民在當地，如果俄羅斯攻擊並造成損害，俄羅斯能脫得了干係嗎？講者認為不可能，否則美國財長不會刻意發布那樣的聲明。這基本上就是一種事先警告：如果俄羅斯繼續開戰不收手，將來美軍介入時，美國就有理由出兵了，可以說是要保護美國資產，甚至可能駐軍。
講者預料到此處可能會有人批評美國是趁人之危，但他指出，如果實際閱讀協議內容，會發現美國非常慷慨。協議清楚寫明，所有權、控制權、礦產開採權全部屬於烏克蘭，完全沒有烏克蘭「賣土地」或「送礦權」的問題。連在哪裡開採、開採什麼，都完全由烏克蘭決定，澤倫斯基的面子和尊重都給足了，這對烏克蘭公民和憲政體制也是一種莫大的安心感。簡單來說，烏克蘭出土地，美國出其他所有，烏克蘭獲得利潤和龐大工作機會，基本上算是被動收入。即使烏克蘭將來加入歐盟，美國也會尊重烏克蘭作為歐盟成員的義務，協議還可以修改。這類似於1948年援助歐洲的馬歇爾計畫，差別只在於如果礦產營運有獲利，美國能分到一份利潤。講者強調，這就是慷慨的程度，讓觀眾自行判斷。他認為，看到這份協議後，如果還有人說美國投機或不真誠，那就是胡說八道。這份協議最大的意義在於對和平和重建烏克蘭的承諾，所以與美國綁定利益是好事。就像最近台積電在美國設廠，台灣有些人在網路上鬼吼鬼叫說台積電被賣給美國，那些這樣想的人，講者認為很可憐、很悲哀，有腦子卻不用，真是浪費。

台灣的「綠共」抗議與假訊息問題


影片的後半段轉向台灣的時事，講者談到上週六，藍白陣營舉行的4月26日「反獨裁」遊行。他認為，單憑他們能夠走上街頭高喊「綠共下台」，就已經向台灣人民證明了台灣並非獨裁政體。然而，遊行後發生了一件出乎意料的溫馨小插曲，導致「綠共」這個詞突然在網路上消失了。在活動前，藍白陣營不斷高喊「綠共」，連中國的網軍也跟著應和，國民黨主席朱立倫也在自己的貼文中多次使用這個詞。但他們沒想到，使用這個詞其實也間接批評了中國共產黨，否則為何要用「共」來作為罵人的詞？他們就是這樣發明了「綠共」。雖然藍白支持者和網軍本意是罵民進黨，結果連中國共產黨也一起罵進去了。
接著發生了一件搞笑的事情。中天新聞在大陸防火牆內的微博上發文，引用朱立倫的「反綠共」言論，並批評台灣政府說：「人民的怒火，現在已在全台灣各地燃燒炸裂。」「如果這位獨裁者仍不願反省懺悔，終將被人民推翻剷除。」因為這則貼文提到了「獨裁者」並使用了「綠共」這個詞，間接罵到了中共，觸發了中國的審查系統。很快地，這則貼文就被系統刪除了。這個結果再次讓台灣人民看到，真正的獨裁政體是中國共產黨。後來，中時集團意識到不對勁，擔心他們的金主會生氣，於是趕快發布了一篇社論，表示「綠共」這個詞有邏輯上的謬誤。講者提到，常看他影片的觀眾應該看過很多次他回擊小粉紅，其中有些就經常喊「綠共」。但在這篇中時社論出現後，現在要看到有人使用這個詞已經困難很多了，因為中共不喜歡這個詞，他們的網軍也就不用了。當然，不是完全沒有，還是有一些真人網軍在使用，但比以前少很多。講者認為這沒關係，如果看到還有人使用這個詞，就把那篇中時社論傳給他們，告訴他們邏輯錯亂了。
講者總結，藍白陣營426遊行最大的成就，就是再次證明了：在民主國家，你可以批評民主；但在獨裁國家，你不能批評獨裁。他覺得這很感人。順帶一提，426活動結束後， Threads上突然出現一堆假的網軍帳號，試圖製造426遊行有很多人參加的假象。所有貼文的格式、排版一模一樣，講者認為這家網軍公司做事很敷衍，活動都結束兩天了他們才發文。而且他抓到了，有些假帳號反覆使用同一張照片。他舉例說明，一個假帳號使用了某張照片發文後，另一個假帳號竟然使用了前一個假帳號的同一張照片。講者認為這些網軍言論就像義和團復辟，很原始、很白痴，連腔調都帶著一股懷舊的臭味，很噁心。最後他提醒大家，台灣是亞洲第一大被假訊息攻擊的國家。現在有很多假帳號刻意發布有爭議的內容，試圖在留言區引發爭論，除了製造對立分化，他們也試圖導風向、洗白。而且不論你回覆什麼，那個假帳號背後的人根本不在乎，甚至回覆你的可能根本不是人，而是一個機器人。現在程式可以設定自動運作。所以如果看到大量重複的貼文或文字非常相似的內容，有87%的可能是網軍公司在作業。最好的方式就是直接封鎖，不要給他們。
================================================

Hello everyone, welcome back to this week's Pink News Bulletin. I'm your best anti-CCP investment advisor,. Mr. Potter. To begin today,. let me update you on. a follow-up to an international news story we previously discussed. That is, two months ago,. Trump and Zelensky. publicly argued in front of everyone. At that time, both sides had agreed. to sign a mineral agreement, but it was shelved. After that unpleasant ending,. Trump told the media. he’d return to the talks. when Zelensky was ready for peace. And as I said on the show before,. I believed this mineral deal. would eventually be signed. Because Ukraine needs U.S. help. Whether before the war started. when the U.S. provided intelligence,. or afterward when the U.S. provided actual aid,. and to this day,. the U.S. is still. the largest aid provider to Ukraine. Ukraine can't afford not to sign. It’s just a matter of how. Because it’s Ukraine that needs help. And if this mineral deal is signed,. it's another kind of guarantee from the U.S. to Ukraine. A long-term, healthy relationship. It has to be mutually beneficial. Signing it also sends a message to Russia—. the U.S. and Ukraine’s interests are now tied. That’s why Trump was so confident then. They’re different countries after all. You can't expect free help forever. Eventually, that’s not sustainable. Spending American taxpayers' money endlessly. is hard to justify to the public. And do you remember. what the EU’s reaction was when they argued? It was at that moment. that they truly realized—. if the U.S. really stops helping,. and Ukraine falls to Russia,. they’ll be next in line. The U.S. kept urging the EU to do more,. but they didn’t for three years. Until Trump came in and really pushed things,. then the EU finally felt a crisis. So they made a big show. of voicing full support for Ukraine. But two months later,. what actual help has there been? I don't even need to say it—. just look at Zelensky’s response. He realized that without the U.S.,. all those EU meetings are meaningless. Even while the EU is meeting with Ukraine,. they’re still buying gas from Russia. Basically keeping Russia alive. How can the war ever end? Some EU politicians are all talk. Macron keeps saying he supports Ukraine,. but it’s just talk. They help—. but not much.

Nowhere near what the U.S. provides. Finally, there was an opportunity. The U.S. and Ukraine. met at the funeral of Pope Francis. Their leaders had a chance to meet. They pulled up chairs in a corner and talked it out. And afterward, the mineral agreement was smoothly signed. By the way, when Trump and Zelensky. were about to talk at the funeral,. three chairs were prepared—. for Trump, Zelensky, and Macron. But we don't really know what Trump said afterward—. Macron left the scene. That leaked footage. had no audio at the time. So we don’t know what was said. But lip-reading experts online analyzed it—. Trump told Macron:. “You shouldn't be here.”. He told Macron. not to join the meeting with Zelensky. “I need a favor from you.”. “You shouldn't be here.”. Zelensky nodded beside him. I found that little episode. quite interesting. Just sharing with you. And after the two countries signed the agreement,. U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessant. posted on Twitter, saying. this deal is of great historical significance. And I translated part of his remarks. to share with you all. These remarks made things very clear. He even directly warned Russia,. saying American companies are investing in Ukraine. This is different from previous aid—. it’s a joint venture. It tells other countries:. Ukraine's interests are America's interests. And this isn't short-term—. it’s about long-term mutual benefit. After this deal was signed,. America went from just supporting from the sidelines. to becoming a quasi-participant. It can be seen as Ukraine. officially entering the U.S. security umbrella. In the future, with U.S. companies setting up in Ukraine,. and American citizens present—. if Russia attacks and causes harm,. would Russia get away with it? I don't think so. Otherwise, the U.S. Treasury Secretary. wouldn't have made that statement deliberately. It's essentially a warning upfront—. if Russia keeps fighting and refuses to stop,. then if the U.S. military joins in later,. America has a reason to send troops. They could say it's to protect U.S. assets. Stationing troops is even possible. But based on my experience,. at this point,. some little pinks will still. find something to criticize. They might say the U.S. is just taking advantage of the situation. But if you actually read the content of the agreement,. you'll see that the U.S. is being very generous. The agreement clearly states.

that ownership, control, and mining rights all belong to Ukraine. So there's no concern about Ukraine "selling land" or "giving away mining rights." Even where to mine. and what to mine. is entirely decided by Ukraine. Zelensky is given full face and respect. And this is also a major reassurance for Ukrainian citizens and their constitutional system. To put it plainly—. Ukraine provides the land,. the U.S. provides everything else. Ukraine gets profits. and massive job opportunities. It’s basically passive income. And if Ukraine joins the EU in the future,. the U.S. will also respect Ukraine's. obligations as an EU member. The agreement can be revised. It’s similar to the 1948. Marshall Plan that aided Europe,. just with one difference—. if the mining operation is profitable,. the U.S. gets a share of the profits. That’s how generous this is—I'll let you be the judge. After seeing this agreement,. if anyone still says. the U.S. is being opportunistic or insincere,. then they’re just full of nonsense. The biggest significance of this agreement. is the promise of peace. and rebuilding Ukraine. So tying interests to the U.S. is a good thing. Just like when TSMC set up a plant in the U.S. recently,. some people in Taiwan started shouting nonsense online—. not sure if they were just ignorant or pretending—. saying that TSMC was sold to the U.S. People who think like that—. pitiful. Sad. Having a brain but not using it—. what a waste. What a waste. So what do you think about these developments? Let me know in the comments below. And for the second half of today’s video,. I’d like to talk about. last Saturday—. the Blue-White Camp’s. April 26 “Anti-Dictatorship” protest. The very fact they could march the streets yelling “down with the Green CCP”. already proves to the Taiwanese people—. Taiwan is not a dictatorship. But unexpectedly, after the protest,. a heartwarming little episode occurred—. causing the term “Green CCP” to suddenly vanish online. Before the event, the Blue-White camp kept shouting “Green CCP.”. Even Chinese internet trolls echoed it. KMT chairman Eric Chu. also used the term repeatedly in his posts. But they didn't realize that by using this term,. they were also indirectly criticizing the Chinese Communist Party. Because otherwise, why use “CCP” as the insult? That’s how they coined “Green CCP.”. Even though Blue-White supporters and online trolls. meant to insult the DPP,. they ended up insulting the Chinese Communist Party too. And then something hilarious happened. CTI News posted on Weibo inside the Great Firewall,.

quoting KMT Chairman Eric Chu’s anti-Green CCP remarks,. and criticizing the Taiwanese government, saying:. “The people’s anger. is now erupting across every corner of Taiwan.”. “If this dictator refuses to reflect and repent,. the people will eventually overthrow and remove him.”. Because this post mentioned a "dictator" and used the term “Green CCP,”. it indirectly insulted the CCP. It triggered China’s censorship system. Soon after, the post was removed by the system. This outcome once again. shows the people of Taiwan. that the real dictatorship is the CCP. Later, the China Times sensed trouble,. worried their backers would be angry. So they quickly published an editorial saying—. “The term Green CCP is logically flawed.”. Regular viewers of Mr. Porter’s videos. should’ve seen plenty of times. when I clap back at little pinks—. some of them always shout “Green CCP.”. But after that China Times editorial appeared,. it’s now much harder. to see that term being used. Because the CCP dislikes it—. their trolls stopped using it. Of course, it's not entirely gone. Some real human trolls still use it,. but much less than before. But that’s okay—. if you see someone still using that term,. just send them that China Times editorial,. and say they’re logically confused. The biggest achievement of the Blue-White camp's 426 protest. was once again proving that—. in a democracy, you can criticize democracy. But in a dictatorship, you can’t criticize dictatorship. How touching. Oh, by the way—. after the 426 event ended,. a bunch of fake troll accounts suddenly appeared on Threads,. trying to create the illusion that many people had joined the 426 protest. All the posts had the exact same formatting and layout. This troll company really is sloppy. The event was already over for two days when they posted. And I caught them—. some fake accounts used the same photos repeatedly. Take this fake account—look closely:. zhangchao5047. After stealing a photo and posting it,. another fake account, yingying0155,. used the same exact photo from the previous account. These troll comments. are like a revival of the Boxer Rebellion—. primitive,. and idiotic. Even the tone carries a nostalgic stink. Gross. A reminder to everyone—. Taiwan ranks number one in Asia. for being attacked by disinformation. Many fake accounts today. intentionally post controversial content. to spark arguments in the comments. Besides creating division,. they also try to steer narratives and whitewash. And whatever you reply—.

the person behind that fake account. doesn't even care. In fact, the one replying to you. might not even be a person—. it could be a bot. Programs can now be set. to run automatically. So if you see tons of duplicate posts. or suspiciously similar copy,. 87% chance it's troll farms at work. Best to block them immediately—. don’t give them traffic. Also, Taiwan’s mass recall campaigns. are still ongoing. Many places have already met the signature threshold. But it's not over yet. Not until those CCP agents are recalled. and pro-China legislators are removed—. that’s when it’s complete. If the recall goes smoothly,. we can weaken the CCP’s influence in Taiwan. That’s why even the CCP mouthpiece, China Youth Daily,. has started attacking Taiwan’s recall movement. They even published an article saying the recall is bad for Taiwan. My friends—. if the CCP’s state media says that,. it means this recall movement. is absolutely good for Taiwan. The CCP is Taiwan’s enemy. Whatever the enemy dislikes—. we keep doing it. And to wrap up today’s video—. here are some headshot comments from my channel. “I’m from mainland China. Although I oppose your stance on the Taiwan issue,. I still thank you. You’ve helped many mainlanders awaken after watching your videos. I hope your videos can awaken even more people in China.”. Awesome! Another little pink has been successfully awakened by my video. Gratified. Moved. But you’re not fully awake yet. I respect you now—. because you’re halfway awake. So now I’ll call you a “Chinese netizen.”. Let me remind you—. The reason you oppose Taiwan's position. is because you're still holding onto unification ideology. And that ideology. was planted by. the CCP as a toxic legacy in your mind. Only when you truly accept that. the CCP has never ruled Taiwan for even one day,. and that Taiwan's future should be decided by Taiwanese people—. not by people from China—. will things be clear to you. This isn’t an attack—it’s the truth outside your firewall. Those textbooks in elementary school saying “Beautiful Treasure Island Taiwan”—. that was CCP brainwashing. It made you think Taiwan belongs to the PRC. But that's just not true. Just like now—you're halfway awake. The CCP claims to represent the Chinese people,. and says "without the Party, there's no new China." But you don’t believe that anymore, right? Same thing applies here. You’ve figured that part out.

You’ve awakened. And the Taiwan issue is no different. You need to get that straight too. But still—congrats. I hope the seed of democracy I planted. keeps growing strong inside your heart. Become a righteous and unapologetic bastard. Alright then. Looks like you’ve already made it. You bastard. Here’s a joke:. “Trump also said he wants to be a dictator.”. So who are you choosing now—the CCP or the 'American CCP'? At worst, Trump just likes to talk crap. But the CCP literally runs tanks over people. Is that even a real choice? Has the U.S. ever forced Taiwan to call themselves Americans? I’m not even sure Trump actually said he wanted to be a dictator. You might be misquoting him. Even if Trump did make some exaggerated or joking comment. like “I want to be a dictator,”. the U.S. system. is still a sound democracy. Just because he says it doesn’t mean he can do it. The CCP, on the other hand, is a real dictatorship. It has no structural checks. America has democratic institutions,. with elections, opposition parties, and a free press. A U.S. president can be criticized, impeached, or recalled. And the CCP? You hold up a blank piece of paper and you get disappeared. How do you even compare the two? “American CCP”? Seriously? What kind of illogical term is that? I just love watching little frogs panic. Please stop typing comments. while staring at yourself in the mirror. You’re the one actually living in the well. Did you forget that just to comment here,. you had to bypass the firewall? “Porter King, you say you oppose the CCP,. but you’re actually pro-CCP and selling out Taiwan!”. Huh? Let me clarify one thing first—. Did you get the wrong guy? Did you mix up Porter King with “Bitcoin King”? What exactly have I done to be called pro-CCP? Did I push any pro-China bills in the legislature? Did I make shows that whitewash or spread CCP lies? Have you even watched my videos? All I do is expose the bad things the CCP has done,. and warn Taiwanese people not to fall for cognitive warfare. That’s selling out? Let me flip the question. To sell out Taiwan—. means you profit from it, right? Like money or favors? But look at me—exposing CCP operations,. leaking United Front plans early,. disrupting their agendas. If I can still get red money from the CCP. for doing that—. that’d be amazing! If that kind of deal exists,. I’d be uploading daily. If you think this makes money—. come join me! Let’s pursue the freedom to roast the CCP together.

I’ve said it many times—. The whole Mr. Porter character. was created because of this. Mr. Porter welcomes you. to walk the anti-CCP path. You can be “Teacher Junyong.”. Let’s promote anti-CCP resistance together. I’m more curious—. How much DPP funding do you think I got? Why does being anti-CCP. automatically mean I’m funded by the DPP? The meaning behind your words—. isn’t it basically saying. KMT and TPP don’t oppose the CCP? If we follow your broken logic,. why don’t you ask all those. pro-CCP or silent influencers. if they’re getting KMT or TPP money? I oppose the CCP because I identify as Taiwanese. I’m not doing this for the DPP. It’s because I don’t want the CCP to successfully infiltrate. That’s why I call on everyone to resist the CCP. If you can't respond to what I actually said in the video,. then all you can do is throw out random accusations. Saying I got paid, huh? Paid where, exactly? Even when I went to Taipei to speak at the mass recall rally,. I paid out of my own pocket. That was ordinary people voluntarily standing up. If you have proof I got paid—. go ahead, expose it to the media, I support that. But if you’ve got no evidence—. then maybe you’re the one getting paid. Why else would that idea pop into your head? You’re just used to getting paid. That’s why whenever someone disagrees with you,. you assume they’re paid too. "Tag a Taiwan independence criminal sentenced to death." Being called pro-independence? I’m honored. Typical Little Pink behavior:. Living like a prisoner themselves,. yet still rushing to sentence others to death. Taiwan independence isn’t dead—. but the CCP might be soon. Let’s see who lasts longer. Also, if you’re tagging me,. that means I’m on your mind. Even though I honestly don’t care about you. Little Pink, to me,. you’re just a joke sent to be dunked on. In real life, I’m doing just fine in Taiwan. You’re stuck inside the firewall,. working 996,. fantasizing about Five Togethers. With your $450 monthly salary,. you barely have any rest time—. and you still live under the risk of forced organ harvesting. Even in such miserable conditions,. you still make time to comment on my videos. Still following what I’m up to. That’s not tagging—. that’s a crush. Seriously. That’s it for today’s video. If you liked it, please like and subscribe. You’re also welcome to join my YouTube membership. to support this series.

I’m Potter King. See you in the next video. Bye!

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OjjruMXPcck

item.title: 台灣不是中國的！美國首次在聯合國提2758決議不涉台｜中共搬石砸腳，助台站上國際舞台｜喊綠共都普攏共，邏輯打臉小粉紅｜粉紅特報124期
item.itunes:title: 台灣不是中國的！美國首次在聯合國提2758決議不涉台｜中共搬石砸腳，助台站上國際舞台｜喊綠共都普攏共，邏輯打臉小粉紅｜粉紅特報124期
item.itunes:author: 波特王好帥
item.itunes:summary:
```html

值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解美國首次在聯合國安理會上，如何直接挑戰中國對2758號決議的錯誤詮釋，對台灣的國際參與具有重要意義。
  • 深入解析此次美中在聯合國場域的尖銳交鋒，包括雙方在貿易、南海等議題上的攻防細節。
  • 揭示這場由中國發起的會議如何弄巧成拙，反而為台灣議題贏得更多國際關注與法理支持。

摘要

作者開頭指出本週一則重要的國際新聞，對台灣而言是個好消息。他提到，美國首次在聯合國安理會上嚴厲批評中國，指控中國故意曲解聯合國第2758號決議，以孤立台灣。美國並強調，該決議並未排除台灣參與聯合國體系或其他國際論壇。作者曾提及美國在國會或其他民主國家也有類似表態，但這次事件發生在聯合國安理會，且是由中國自己創造的機會，因此意義重大。

[00:01:50]

作者接著描述了此次事件的背景：中國近期在聯合國安理會召開了一場名為「單邊主義和霸凌行徑對國際關係的影響」的「阿里亞模式會議」（Arria-formula meeting）。中國常駐聯合國代表傅聰在會上批評美國利用關稅「霸凌」世界，企圖顛覆現有國際貿易秩序。

[00:03:00]

作為回應，美國代表吳婷（Ting Wu）當場強硬回擊，稱這場由中國主持的會議不過是場「表演秀」，前提空洞、毫無可信度。她強調評估中國對國際體系的貢獻，應看其「行動」而非「空話」，並直接用中文說出「中國說一套做一套」。吳婷列舉了中國長期以來的單邊不公平貿易行為，如國家補貼、造成產能過剩、傾銷商品、設置非關稅壁壘，以及在南海的脅迫行徑（如阻礙菲律賓）。

[00:04:30]

吳婷接著強調，既然會議概念文件呼籲反對所有形式的單邊主義和霸凌，那麼就必須指出中國「濫用聯合國大會第2758號決議來孤立台灣」，扭曲他國政策並限制其選擇自由。她明確指出，該決議「不排除台灣有意義地參與聯合國體系及其他多邊論壇」。美國將繼續與盟友合作，對抗北京將其威權原則植入聯合國體系的企圖，並捍衛公平經濟競爭與自由企業。

[00:05:30]

作者對美國代表的發言表示「非常暖心」，並解釋此次發言是在聯合國安理會、且由中國自己主持的會議上發生，這種直接對抗「極為罕見」，顯示美國不再容忍中國利用聯合國程序施壓。美國明確指出2758號決議僅處理「誰代表中國」，而非「台灣的代表權」，精準拆解了中共的論述，有力支持台灣參與WHA、ICAO等國際組織。

[00:07:00]

作者認為，中國宣稱反對霸凌，卻在南海霸佔專屬經濟區並阻礙菲律賓，正應驗了「說一套做一套」。他特別讚賞吳婷切換成中文的表達方式，認為這能更有效地傳遞訊息，甚至穿透防火牆，讓中共無從粉飾。對台灣而言，這不只是道德支持，更是法律與制度上的防禦，有助於台灣獲得更廣泛的國際認可。作者諷刺中國是「搬石頭砸自己的腳」，本想批評美國，反倒挨了批，還讓台灣議題在聯合國獲得更多關注。

[00:08:30]

此外，美國國務院發言人駁斥中國指控，稱該會議是「浪費安理會成員時間」，並批評中國論述自相矛盾。美國參議員Rick Scott則對聯合國允許中國舉辦此類會議表示不滿，認為美國提供資金卻被用來批評美國，呼籲停止資助。作者認為此事也凸顯了聯合國長期以來依賴民主國家資金，卻被威權國家操弄的問題，但他認為中國的舊伎倆已不奏效，世界已看清中共本質。

[00:09:50]

作者總結當前國際情勢是台灣等待的機會，鼓勵觀眾分享影片，並提及將在影片後半段回應評論（但此摘要僅涵蓋前半段的國際新聞部分）。


```
================================================

Hello everyone, welcome back to this week's Pink News Report. I'm your best anti-CCP investment advisor. Mr. Potter. At the start of today's video,. I'd like to share with you. an important piece of international news this week. And I believe it's great news for Taiwan. For the first time, the U.S. harshly criticized China at the UN Security Council. for deliberately misinterpreting Resolution 2758. to isolate Taiwan. The U.S. also emphasized that Resolution 2758. does not exclude Taiwan's participation. in the UN system or other international forums. Some viewers might remember. that I've talked about this before,. when the U.S. addressed it in their own Congress. I also made a video about it a few months ago,. introducing how other democracies. are standing with Taiwan. and recognizing that Resolution 2758 does not involve Taiwan. If you haven't seen those videos yet,. you can check them out later. But this time is different—. this happened at the UN Security Council,. in front of many UN member states. and observers. This holds great significance for Taiwan. And what's even better is—. this opportunity was actually created by China itself. Very heartwarming. Here's what happened. China recently convened an Arria-formula meeting. at the UN Security Council,. titled:. "The Impact of Unilateralism and Bullying Practices on International Relations." During the meeting,. China accused the U.S. of using tariffs to bully the world. This led to. a heated confrontation between China and the U.S. Just a side note—. this Arria-formula meeting I mentioned. is different from a formal UN Security Council meeting. The biggest difference is that. Arria meetings. aren't bound by strict procedural rules. The format is very flexible. Besides Security Council members,. they can also invite non-UN members,. NGOs, scholars, witnesses,. or representatives from civil society to speak. The goal is to expose hidden facts. and allow more voices to be heard. For example, in 2021,. the U.S. and other countries. held an Arria meeting. on China's abuses in Xinjiang,.

inviting Uyghur victims and human rights groups to speak. Now that we understand the background,. let's get back to this event. China's Permanent Representative to the UN, Fu Cong,. started by criticizing the U.S.,. saying that deep down,. America's real intent. is to use tariffs. to overturn the current international trade order,. putting U.S. interests above global interests. He also emphasized that. in the face of what he called "U.S. abuse of tariffs," China has taken "decisive countermeasures" to defend its rights and uphold global trade rules. In response to China's accusations,. U.S. delegate Ting Wu. hit back hard on the spot. Let's read what she said. She said that today's meeting hosted by China. was nothing but a performative stunt. Its premise lacked any substance. and had zero credibility. When assessing China's contribution to the international system,. the world should look at China's actions,. not just its empty words. And in the next line,. she switched to Mandarin. and said:. China says one thing but does another. Their actions don't match their words. For a long time,. China has engaged in unilateral unfair trade practices,. hurting not only the U.S.,. but also global market economies and workers worldwide. China continues to use state subsidies. and other non-market practices. to create overcapacity,. dumping goods and impacting global markets,. squeezing out local economies. Beijing also employs various non-tariff barriers. that hurt farmers and manufacturers worldwide,. including restrictions. on dual-use exports, imposing sanctions,. and conducting antitrust and anti-dumping investigations. Beijing also manipulates international financial institutions,. borrowing money just to lend it out again,. whitewashing its image. while stuffing its pockets. through massive development contracts. China claims to be a developing country,. yet it weaponizes its donor status. and development programs. to bully other developing member states. This situation. cannot continue. President Trump is reshaping the trade environment. to stop China from taking advantage anymore.

We've also witnessed time and again. China's coercive actions in the South China Sea. Remember—. even when China was the rotating president. of the Security Council this February,. talking big about leadership,. it still illegally obstructed. the Philippines' actions near Scarborough Shoal. The U.S. firmly stands with the Philippines. We again condemn. China’s dangerous and unlawful actions in the South China Sea,. and we call on China to comply with the 2016 arbitration ruling. The concept note for this meeting calls. for opposition to all forms of unilateralism and bullying. Here's the key—. therefore, we must emphasize:. China’s misuse of UN General Assembly Resolution 2758. to try to isolate Taiwan,. to distort other countries’ policies,. and to restrict their freedom of choice. This resolution. does not preclude Taiwan’s meaningful participation in the UN system. and other multilateral forums. The U.S. will continue working closely with our allies and partners. to counter Beijing’s attempts. to insert its authoritarian principles. into the UN system. We will also continue defending fair economic competition,. supporting innovation over IP theft,. and supporting free enterprise over authoritarianism. Thank you. After hearing this speech,. it’s just heartwarming. Let me break it down for you. Also, a reminder—. Wu Ting's remarks weren’t made at some obscure side forum. They were made at the UN Security Council,. and at a meeting led by China itself. A direct confrontation. That's extremely rare in diplomatic settings. It shows the U.S. is no longer tolerating. China’s years of exploiting UN procedures. and vague language to pressure other countries. In the past, the CCP kept using Resolution 2758. as a universal excuse to exclude Taiwan. But now things have changed. The U.S. made it clear:. Resolution 2758. only deals with who represents China,. not Taiwan's representation. This is a precise dismantling of the CCP’s rhetoric,. and a strong support. for Taiwan's participation in international organizations. like WHA and ICAO. China keeps claiming to oppose unilateral bullying,. yet it bullies others by occupying exclusive economic zones in the South China Sea,. and obstructs the Philippines.

Just like the Chinese proverb cited—. actions and words don't match. Saying one thing, doing another. Wu Ting was speaking English at first,. but for that sentence, she deliberately switched to Mandarin. I think that’s brilliant. It made her message. even more culturally penetrating,. using language that even Chinese netizens inside the firewall can understand,. and directly slapping the CCP. Leaving the CCP no way to whitewash it. For Taiwan,. this speech isn’t just moral support—. it's a legal and institutional defense,. helping Taiwan gain broader international recognition,. and paving the way for more public support from allies and partners. Honestly—. the CCP is really good at. shooting itself in the foot. They tried to rally other countries to criticize the U.S.,. but no one sided with China. Instead, they got a massive slap in the face,. and even brought more attention. to Taiwan's issue at the UN. Heartwarming! Meanwhile, a U.S. State Department spokesperson. also dismissed China's accusations,. saying bluntly—. this meeting was a waste of Security Council members’ time,. and slammed China's narrative as self-contradictory,. saying that China claims to support open markets,. but at the same time,. dumps artificially low-priced goods onto the global economy,. and steals intellectual property. to gain unfair trade advantages. Meanwhile, U.S. Senator Rick Scott. expressed strong dissatisfaction. with the UN allowing China to hold such a meeting. He posted on Twitter saying—. Let's make this clear:. The U.S. covers 22% of the UN’s annual budget,. and is the biggest financial supporter of countless UN projects. And yet now, the UN is using that money. to host a CCP-led meeting. accusing America of "bullying" them,. just because we finally have. a president who puts America first. That’s ridiculous! (Well, okay, maybe he didn’t say it exactly like that—. I’m just adding a little flair.). We should immediately. stop funding this anti-American UN. This situation also highlights. a longstanding UN problem:. Financially reliant on democracies,. but politically manipulated by authoritarian states. But China’s old tricks aren't working anymore.

The world sees right through the CCP now. So what do you think about all this? Feel free to leave a comment below. And please share this video! The current international situation. is truly the opportunity Taiwan has been waiting for. Anyone trying to pull you. into siding with China—. they’re either ignorant. or malicious. Of course, some people who are politically indifferent. might just not understand,. but that's okay. I think my videos are pretty beginner-friendly. Not too dry,. and a little bit funny. So feel free to share them with your friends! And once again, I urge all Taiwanese friends—. let's complete our mission for this year:. Join the mass recall petition! Let's remove the pro-CCP lawmakers together. Come join our big anti-CCP family! Today’s Pink News Report is the last update of the month,. but we've collected way too many pinkies (haters') comments. Especially after my 419 speech at Ketagalan Boulevard,. even more pinkies showed up. So for the second half of today's video,. let’s look at some of their comments together. "Good-looking guy,. but doesn’t speak human words." Better than being ugly. and still not speaking human words. What kind of grammar is "good-looking guy" anyway? You say others can't speak properly,. yet you can’t even form a proper sentence yourself. How do you even have the nerve? But hey, thanks anyway. for admitting I’m good-looking. Even people who hate me. can’t deny my looks. Honestly,. that’s even more convincing than a compliment. But I have to remind you:. what I talk about in my videos and posts. are actual bad things. the CCP has done,. and facts about pro-CCP lawmakers in Taiwan. If you can’t even face these facts,. then you really are better off supporting. parties that only cover up the truth. "Good job Taiwan youth, starting your own Cultural Revolution. Going backwards. Brilliant." "I thought Taiwan was only 30 years behind. Turns out it’s more like 50 years." Huh? How is anything I said. related to the Cultural Revolution?

You need to understand—. during the Cultural Revolution, Mao mobilized the whole country,. brainwashed people with party media,. incited them to attack each other,. eliminate dissent,. and destroy intellectuals. Where am I doing any of that? I’m just exposing. the dirty deeds the CCP itself has done. In Taiwan, people can criticize the government,. protest on the streets if they're unhappy,. and TV shows can roast government officials. Where’s the Cultural Revolution? You little pinkies live. in a hell where holding up a blank sheet of paper gets you arrested,. and you’re telling me Taiwan has a Cultural Revolution? Tell you what:. let’s livestream together. I'll go hold up a blank sheet of paper in front of Taiwan’s Presidential Office,. and you go hold one up in front of Tiananmen Square. Let's see who ends up getting rubbed into the ground. Who's going to get crushed first. Dare or not? If you don't dare,. then deep down you already know what the CCP really is. Green commies are still commies. If we don't fight them now, the country will be destroyed. Arrest them! Taiwan separatists! You've insulted China! Just saying Taiwan is a country is already an insult! I'll be straight—. those who say "green commies" are seriously clueless. And their heads are full of crap. Think about it—. if the DPP were really green commies,. you would've been arrested for subversion already. How could you still be here talking nonsense? If you were really living under "green commie rule," the Blue-White 426 rally. wouldn't even exist. The very fact the 426 protest happened. proves Taiwan isn’t a dictatorship. From the way you talk,. it's clear you know communism is bad. That’s why you came up with. this weird "green commies" term. So let me ask—. when the KMT kisses up to the real CCP,. why do you stay silent? Former Taipei County Mayor Chou Hsi-wei. shouted "China is our home" this month in China. Helping the CCP with propaganda. KMT's Sean Lien also went to China this week. and called himself Chinese. And there’s Hung Hsiu-chu, Liu Chao-hsuan, and more.

Just this month, so many KMT members. have gone to China pledging loyalty. Not saying every KMT member is like that,. but it’s always the KMT. And the blue camp still holds a majority in Congress. They’re proposing tons of pro-China bills,. wrecking the constitution and governance—. but you don’t call them "blue commies"? CCP and "green commies" are family? All I see is. the mindset of shameless scammers. Stop pretending to be cool. Same problem as the earlier one. People shouting "green commies" are clueless. I'll say it again—. I'm not trying to act cool. I'm just naturally being myself in front of everyone. Just being friends with everyone. But the fact that you said that—. means you think I'm handsome deep down. Whether you’re a blue-white troll. or a pinky pretending to be Taiwanese—. either way,. stop confessing to me already! I can’t date someone. whose values are completely different. "Taiwan is part of China! Porter King should be sentenced to death!" You said it yourself—. doesn't that make it even clearer. why Taiwan shouldn't be part of China? But little pinkies—. even if you come to hate on me,. I really won’t hold it against you. Because who knows when, in your abyss of a country,. you might get dragged off for organ harvesting. Maybe the last thing you ever say. is that hate comment you left here. You thought I'd get executed first—. but in the end,. you're the one lying on the operating table. They say empathy matters, right? But actually,. you little pinkies are the ones. who might truly "give your heart to others." Because my heart. is still beating inside me,. but yours might end up transplanted into someone else. True empathy. Alright, that’s it for today’s video! If you enjoyed it, please like and subscribe! And feel free to join my YouTube channel membership. to support this series. I'm Potter King. See you in the next video! See you next time! Bye-bye!

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5R5olTLTN2I

點連結成為我的Youtube頻道會員：https://goo.gl/MFNUKr
