```html

值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解美國首次在聯合國安理會上，如何直接挑戰中國對2758號決議的錯誤詮釋，對台灣的國際參與具有重要意義。
  • 深入解析此次美中在聯合國場域的尖銳交鋒，包括雙方在貿易、南海等議題上的攻防細節。
  • 揭示這場由中國發起的會議如何弄巧成拙，反而為台灣議題贏得更多國際關注與法理支持。

摘要

作者開頭指出本週一則重要的國際新聞，對台灣而言是個好消息。他提到，美國首次在聯合國安理會上嚴厲批評中國，指控中國故意曲解聯合國第2758號決議，以孤立台灣。美國並強調，該決議並未排除台灣參與聯合國體系或其他國際論壇。作者曾提及美國在國會或其他民主國家也有類似表態，但這次事件發生在聯合國安理會，且是由中國自己創造的機會，因此意義重大。

[00:01:50]

作者接著描述了此次事件的背景：中國近期在聯合國安理會召開了一場名為「單邊主義和霸凌行徑對國際關係的影響」的「阿里亞模式會議」（Arria-formula meeting）。中國常駐聯合國代表傅聰在會上批評美國利用關稅「霸凌」世界，企圖顛覆現有國際貿易秩序。

[00:03:00]

作為回應，美國代表吳婷（Ting Wu）當場強硬回擊，稱這場由中國主持的會議不過是場「表演秀」，前提空洞、毫無可信度。她強調評估中國對國際體系的貢獻，應看其「行動」而非「空話」，並直接用中文說出「中國說一套做一套」。吳婷列舉了中國長期以來的單邊不公平貿易行為，如國家補貼、造成產能過剩、傾銷商品、設置非關稅壁壘，以及在南海的脅迫行徑（如阻礙菲律賓）。

[00:04:30]

吳婷接著強調，既然會議概念文件呼籲反對所有形式的單邊主義和霸凌，那麼就必須指出中國「濫用聯合國大會第2758號決議來孤立台灣」，扭曲他國政策並限制其選擇自由。她明確指出，該決議「不排除台灣有意義地參與聯合國體系及其他多邊論壇」。美國將繼續與盟友合作，對抗北京將其威權原則植入聯合國體系的企圖，並捍衛公平經濟競爭與自由企業。

[00:05:30]

作者對美國代表的發言表示「非常暖心」，並解釋此次發言是在聯合國安理會、且由中國自己主持的會議上發生，這種直接對抗「極為罕見」，顯示美國不再容忍中國利用聯合國程序施壓。美國明確指出2758號決議僅處理「誰代表中國」，而非「台灣的代表權」，精準拆解了中共的論述，有力支持台灣參與WHA、ICAO等國際組織。

[00:07:00]

作者認為，中國宣稱反對霸凌，卻在南海霸佔專屬經濟區並阻礙菲律賓，正應驗了「說一套做一套」。他特別讚賞吳婷切換成中文的表達方式，認為這能更有效地傳遞訊息，甚至穿透防火牆，讓中共無從粉飾。對台灣而言，這不只是道德支持，更是法律與制度上的防禦，有助於台灣獲得更廣泛的國際認可。作者諷刺中國是「搬石頭砸自己的腳」，本想批評美國，反倒挨了批，還讓台灣議題在聯合國獲得更多關注。

[00:08:30]

此外，美國國務院發言人駁斥中國指控，稱該會議是「浪費安理會成員時間」，並批評中國論述自相矛盾。美國參議員Rick Scott則對聯合國允許中國舉辦此類會議表示不滿，認為美國提供資金卻被用來批評美國，呼籲停止資助。作者認為此事也凸顯了聯合國長期以來依賴民主國家資金，卻被威權國家操弄的問題，但他認為中國的舊伎倆已不奏效，世界已看清中共本質。

[00:09:50]

作者總結當前國際情勢是台灣等待的機會，鼓勵觀眾分享影片，並提及將在影片後半段回應評論（但此摘要僅涵蓋前半段的國際新聞部分）。


```
================================================

Hello everyone, welcome back to this week's Pink News Report. I'm your best anti-CCP investment advisor. Mr. Potter. At the start of today's video,. I'd like to share with you. an important piece of international news this week. And I believe it's great news for Taiwan. For the first time, the U.S. harshly criticized China at the UN Security Council. for deliberately misinterpreting Resolution 2758. to isolate Taiwan. The U.S. also emphasized that Resolution 2758. does not exclude Taiwan's participation. in the UN system or other international forums. Some viewers might remember. that I've talked about this before,. when the U.S. addressed it in their own Congress. I also made a video about it a few months ago,. introducing how other democracies. are standing with Taiwan. and recognizing that Resolution 2758 does not involve Taiwan. If you haven't seen those videos yet,. you can check them out later. But this time is different—. this happened at the UN Security Council,. in front of many UN member states. and observers. This holds great significance for Taiwan. And what's even better is—. this opportunity was actually created by China itself. Very heartwarming. Here's what happened. China recently convened an Arria-formula meeting. at the UN Security Council,. titled:. "The Impact of Unilateralism and Bullying Practices on International Relations." During the meeting,. China accused the U.S. of using tariffs to bully the world. This led to. a heated confrontation between China and the U.S. Just a side note—. this Arria-formula meeting I mentioned. is different from a formal UN Security Council meeting. The biggest difference is that. Arria meetings. aren't bound by strict procedural rules. The format is very flexible. Besides Security Council members,. they can also invite non-UN members,. NGOs, scholars, witnesses,. or representatives from civil society to speak. The goal is to expose hidden facts. and allow more voices to be heard. For example, in 2021,. the U.S. and other countries. held an Arria meeting. on China's abuses in Xinjiang,.

inviting Uyghur victims and human rights groups to speak. Now that we understand the background,. let's get back to this event. China's Permanent Representative to the UN, Fu Cong,. started by criticizing the U.S.,. saying that deep down,. America's real intent. is to use tariffs. to overturn the current international trade order,. putting U.S. interests above global interests. He also emphasized that. in the face of what he called "U.S. abuse of tariffs," China has taken "decisive countermeasures" to defend its rights and uphold global trade rules. In response to China's accusations,. U.S. delegate Ting Wu. hit back hard on the spot. Let's read what she said. She said that today's meeting hosted by China. was nothing but a performative stunt. Its premise lacked any substance. and had zero credibility. When assessing China's contribution to the international system,. the world should look at China's actions,. not just its empty words. And in the next line,. she switched to Mandarin. and said:. China says one thing but does another. Their actions don't match their words. For a long time,. China has engaged in unilateral unfair trade practices,. hurting not only the U.S.,. but also global market economies and workers worldwide. China continues to use state subsidies. and other non-market practices. to create overcapacity,. dumping goods and impacting global markets,. squeezing out local economies. Beijing also employs various non-tariff barriers. that hurt farmers and manufacturers worldwide,. including restrictions. on dual-use exports, imposing sanctions,. and conducting antitrust and anti-dumping investigations. Beijing also manipulates international financial institutions,. borrowing money just to lend it out again,. whitewashing its image. while stuffing its pockets. through massive development contracts. China claims to be a developing country,. yet it weaponizes its donor status. and development programs. to bully other developing member states. This situation. cannot continue. President Trump is reshaping the trade environment. to stop China from taking advantage anymore.

We've also witnessed time and again. China's coercive actions in the South China Sea. Remember—. even when China was the rotating president. of the Security Council this February,. talking big about leadership,. it still illegally obstructed. the Philippines' actions near Scarborough Shoal. The U.S. firmly stands with the Philippines. We again condemn. China’s dangerous and unlawful actions in the South China Sea,. and we call on China to comply with the 2016 arbitration ruling. The concept note for this meeting calls. for opposition to all forms of unilateralism and bullying. Here's the key—. therefore, we must emphasize:. China’s misuse of UN General Assembly Resolution 2758. to try to isolate Taiwan,. to distort other countries’ policies,. and to restrict their freedom of choice. This resolution. does not preclude Taiwan’s meaningful participation in the UN system. and other multilateral forums. The U.S. will continue working closely with our allies and partners. to counter Beijing’s attempts. to insert its authoritarian principles. into the UN system. We will also continue defending fair economic competition,. supporting innovation over IP theft,. and supporting free enterprise over authoritarianism. Thank you. After hearing this speech,. it’s just heartwarming. Let me break it down for you. Also, a reminder—. Wu Ting's remarks weren’t made at some obscure side forum. They were made at the UN Security Council,. and at a meeting led by China itself. A direct confrontation. That's extremely rare in diplomatic settings. It shows the U.S. is no longer tolerating. China’s years of exploiting UN procedures. and vague language to pressure other countries. In the past, the CCP kept using Resolution 2758. as a universal excuse to exclude Taiwan. But now things have changed. The U.S. made it clear:. Resolution 2758. only deals with who represents China,. not Taiwan's representation. This is a precise dismantling of the CCP’s rhetoric,. and a strong support. for Taiwan's participation in international organizations. like WHA and ICAO. China keeps claiming to oppose unilateral bullying,. yet it bullies others by occupying exclusive economic zones in the South China Sea,. and obstructs the Philippines.

Just like the Chinese proverb cited—. actions and words don't match. Saying one thing, doing another. Wu Ting was speaking English at first,. but for that sentence, she deliberately switched to Mandarin. I think that’s brilliant. It made her message. even more culturally penetrating,. using language that even Chinese netizens inside the firewall can understand,. and directly slapping the CCP. Leaving the CCP no way to whitewash it. For Taiwan,. this speech isn’t just moral support—. it's a legal and institutional defense,. helping Taiwan gain broader international recognition,. and paving the way for more public support from allies and partners. Honestly—. the CCP is really good at. shooting itself in the foot. They tried to rally other countries to criticize the U.S.,. but no one sided with China. Instead, they got a massive slap in the face,. and even brought more attention. to Taiwan's issue at the UN. Heartwarming! Meanwhile, a U.S. State Department spokesperson. also dismissed China's accusations,. saying bluntly—. this meeting was a waste of Security Council members’ time,. and slammed China's narrative as self-contradictory,. saying that China claims to support open markets,. but at the same time,. dumps artificially low-priced goods onto the global economy,. and steals intellectual property. to gain unfair trade advantages. Meanwhile, U.S. Senator Rick Scott. expressed strong dissatisfaction. with the UN allowing China to hold such a meeting. He posted on Twitter saying—. Let's make this clear:. The U.S. covers 22% of the UN’s annual budget,. and is the biggest financial supporter of countless UN projects. And yet now, the UN is using that money. to host a CCP-led meeting. accusing America of "bullying" them,. just because we finally have. a president who puts America first. That’s ridiculous! (Well, okay, maybe he didn’t say it exactly like that—. I’m just adding a little flair.). We should immediately. stop funding this anti-American UN. This situation also highlights. a longstanding UN problem:. Financially reliant on democracies,. but politically manipulated by authoritarian states. But China’s old tricks aren't working anymore.

The world sees right through the CCP now. So what do you think about all this? Feel free to leave a comment below. And please share this video! The current international situation. is truly the opportunity Taiwan has been waiting for. Anyone trying to pull you. into siding with China—. they’re either ignorant. or malicious. Of course, some people who are politically indifferent. might just not understand,. but that's okay. I think my videos are pretty beginner-friendly. Not too dry,. and a little bit funny. So feel free to share them with your friends! And once again, I urge all Taiwanese friends—. let's complete our mission for this year:. Join the mass recall petition! Let's remove the pro-CCP lawmakers together. Come join our big anti-CCP family! Today’s Pink News Report is the last update of the month,. but we've collected way too many pinkies (haters') comments. Especially after my 419 speech at Ketagalan Boulevard,. even more pinkies showed up. So for the second half of today's video,. let’s look at some of their comments together. "Good-looking guy,. but doesn’t speak human words." Better than being ugly. and still not speaking human words. What kind of grammar is "good-looking guy" anyway? You say others can't speak properly,. yet you can’t even form a proper sentence yourself. How do you even have the nerve? But hey, thanks anyway. for admitting I’m good-looking. Even people who hate me. can’t deny my looks. Honestly,. that’s even more convincing than a compliment. But I have to remind you:. what I talk about in my videos and posts. are actual bad things. the CCP has done,. and facts about pro-CCP lawmakers in Taiwan. If you can’t even face these facts,. then you really are better off supporting. parties that only cover up the truth. "Good job Taiwan youth, starting your own Cultural Revolution. Going backwards. Brilliant." "I thought Taiwan was only 30 years behind. Turns out it’s more like 50 years." Huh? How is anything I said. related to the Cultural Revolution?

You need to understand—. during the Cultural Revolution, Mao mobilized the whole country,. brainwashed people with party media,. incited them to attack each other,. eliminate dissent,. and destroy intellectuals. Where am I doing any of that? I’m just exposing. the dirty deeds the CCP itself has done. In Taiwan, people can criticize the government,. protest on the streets if they're unhappy,. and TV shows can roast government officials. Where’s the Cultural Revolution? You little pinkies live. in a hell where holding up a blank sheet of paper gets you arrested,. and you’re telling me Taiwan has a Cultural Revolution? Tell you what:. let’s livestream together. I'll go hold up a blank sheet of paper in front of Taiwan’s Presidential Office,. and you go hold one up in front of Tiananmen Square. Let's see who ends up getting rubbed into the ground. Who's going to get crushed first. Dare or not? If you don't dare,. then deep down you already know what the CCP really is. Green commies are still commies. If we don't fight them now, the country will be destroyed. Arrest them! Taiwan separatists! You've insulted China! Just saying Taiwan is a country is already an insult! I'll be straight—. those who say "green commies" are seriously clueless. And their heads are full of crap. Think about it—. if the DPP were really green commies,. you would've been arrested for subversion already. How could you still be here talking nonsense? If you were really living under "green commie rule," the Blue-White 426 rally. wouldn't even exist. The very fact the 426 protest happened. proves Taiwan isn’t a dictatorship. From the way you talk,. it's clear you know communism is bad. That’s why you came up with. this weird "green commies" term. So let me ask—. when the KMT kisses up to the real CCP,. why do you stay silent? Former Taipei County Mayor Chou Hsi-wei. shouted "China is our home" this month in China. Helping the CCP with propaganda. KMT's Sean Lien also went to China this week. and called himself Chinese. And there’s Hung Hsiu-chu, Liu Chao-hsuan, and more.

Just this month, so many KMT members. have gone to China pledging loyalty. Not saying every KMT member is like that,. but it’s always the KMT. And the blue camp still holds a majority in Congress. They’re proposing tons of pro-China bills,. wrecking the constitution and governance—. but you don’t call them "blue commies"? CCP and "green commies" are family? All I see is. the mindset of shameless scammers. Stop pretending to be cool. Same problem as the earlier one. People shouting "green commies" are clueless. I'll say it again—. I'm not trying to act cool. I'm just naturally being myself in front of everyone. Just being friends with everyone. But the fact that you said that—. means you think I'm handsome deep down. Whether you’re a blue-white troll. or a pinky pretending to be Taiwanese—. either way,. stop confessing to me already! I can’t date someone. whose values are completely different. "Taiwan is part of China! Porter King should be sentenced to death!" You said it yourself—. doesn't that make it even clearer. why Taiwan shouldn't be part of China? But little pinkies—. even if you come to hate on me,. I really won’t hold it against you. Because who knows when, in your abyss of a country,. you might get dragged off for organ harvesting. Maybe the last thing you ever say. is that hate comment you left here. You thought I'd get executed first—. but in the end,. you're the one lying on the operating table. They say empathy matters, right? But actually,. you little pinkies are the ones. who might truly "give your heart to others." Because my heart. is still beating inside me,. but yours might end up transplanted into someone else. True empathy. Alright, that’s it for today’s video! If you enjoyed it, please like and subscribe! And feel free to join my YouTube channel membership. to support this series. I'm Potter King. See you in the next video! See you next time! Bye-bye!

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5R5olTLTN2I

台灣不是中國的！美國首次在聯合國提2758決議不涉台

中共搬石砸腳，助台站上國際舞台

喊綠共的都普攏共，邏輯打臉小粉紅

粉紅特報124期

追蹤我IG：

https://www.instagram.com/potterking712/

item.content:encoded:
```html

值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解美國首次在聯合國安理會上，如何直接挑戰中國對2758號決議的錯誤詮釋，對台灣的國際參與具有重要意義。
  • 深入解析此次美中在聯合國場域的尖銳交鋒，包括雙方在貿易、南海等議題上的攻防細節。
  • 揭示這場由中國發起的會議如何弄巧成拙，反而為台灣議題贏得更多國際關注與法理支持。

摘要

作者開頭指出本週一則重要的國際新聞，對台灣而言是個好消息。他提到，美國首次在聯合國安理會上嚴厲批評中國，指控中國故意曲解聯合國第2758號決議，以孤立台灣。美國並強調，該決議並未排除台灣參與聯合國體系或其他國際論壇。作者曾提及美國在國會或其他民主國家也有類似表態，但這次事件發生在聯合國安理會，且是由中國自己創造的機會，因此意義重大。

[00:01:50]

作者接著描述了此次事件的背景：中國近期在聯合國安理會召開了一場名為「單邊主義和霸凌行徑對國際關係的影響」的「阿里亞模式會議」（Arria-formula meeting）。中國常駐聯合國代表傅聰在會上批評美國利用關稅「霸凌」世界，企圖顛覆現有國際貿易秩序。

[00:03:00]

作為回應，美國代表吳婷（Ting Wu）當場強硬回擊，稱這場由中國主持的會議不過是場「表演秀」，前提空洞、毫無可信度。她強調評估中國對國際體系的貢獻，應看其「行動」而非「空話」，並直接用中文說出「中國說一套做一套」。吳婷列舉了中國長期以來的單邊不公平貿易行為，如國家補貼、造成產能過剩、傾銷商品、設置非關稅壁壘，以及在南海的脅迫行徑（如阻礙菲律賓）。

[00:04:30]

吳婷接著強調，既然會議概念文件呼籲反對所有形式的單邊主義和霸凌，那麼就必須指出中國「濫用聯合國大會第2758號決議來孤立台灣」，扭曲他國政策並限制其選擇自由。她明確指出，該決議「不排除台灣有意義地參與聯合國體系及其他多邊論壇」。美國將繼續與盟友合作，對抗北京將其威權原則植入聯合國體系的企圖，並捍衛公平經濟競爭與自由企業。

[00:05:30]

作者對美國代表的發言表示「非常暖心」，並解釋此次發言是在聯合國安理會、且由中國自己主持的會議上發生，這種直接對抗「極為罕見」，顯示美國不再容忍中國利用聯合國程序施壓。美國明確指出2758號決議僅處理「誰代表中國」，而非「台灣的代表權」，精準拆解了中共的論述，有力支持台灣參與WHA、ICAO等國際組織。

[00:07:00]

作者認為，中國宣稱反對霸凌，卻在南海霸佔專屬經濟區並阻礙菲律賓，正應驗了「說一套做一套」。他特別讚賞吳婷切換成中文的表達方式，認為這能更有效地傳遞訊息，甚至穿透防火牆，讓中共無從粉飾。對台灣而言，這不只是道德支持，更是法律與制度上的防禦，有助於台灣獲得更廣泛的國際認可。作者諷刺中國是「搬石頭砸自己的腳」，本想批評美國，反倒挨了批，還讓台灣議題在聯合國獲得更多關注。

[00:08:30]

此外，美國國務院發言人駁斥中國指控，稱該會議是「浪費安理會成員時間」，並批評中國論述自相矛盾。美國參議員Rick Scott則對聯合國允許中國舉辦此類會議表示不滿，認為美國提供資金卻被用來批評美國，呼籲停止資助。作者認為此事也凸顯了聯合國長期以來依賴民主國家資金，卻被威權國家操弄的問題，但他認為中國的舊伎倆已不奏效，世界已看清中共本質。

[00:09:50]

作者總結當前國際情勢是台灣等待的機會，鼓勵觀眾分享影片，並提及將在影片後半段回應評論（但此摘要僅涵蓋前半段的國際新聞部分）。


```
================================================

Some viewers might remember. that I've talked about this before,. when the U.S. addressed it in their own Congress. If you haven't seen those videos yet,. you can check them out later. But this time is different—. this happened at the UN Security Council,. in front of many UN member states. and observers. This holds great significance for Taiwan. And what's even better is—. this opportunity was actually created by China itself. Very heartwarming. Here's what happened. China recently convened an Arria-formula meeting. at the UN Security Council,. titled:. "The Impact of Unilateralism and Bullying Practices on International Relations." During the meeting,. China accused the U.S. of using tariffs to bully the world. This led to. a heated confrontation between China and the U.S. Just a side note—. this Arria-formula meeting I mentioned. is different from a formal UN Security Council meeting. The biggest difference is that. Arria meetings. aren't bound by strict procedural rules. The format is very flexible. Besides Security Council members,. they can also invite non-UN members,. NGOs, scholars, witnesses,. or representatives from civil society to speak. The goal is to expose hidden facts. and allow more voices to be heard. For example, in 2021,. the U.S. and other countries. held an Arria meeting. on China's abuses in Xinjiang,.

inviting Uyghur victims and human rights groups to speak. Now that we understand the background,. let's get back to this event. China's Permanent Representative to the UN, Fu Cong,. started by criticizing the U.S.,. saying that deep down,. America's real intent. is to use tariffs. to overturn the current international trade order,. putting U.S. interests above global interests. He also emphasized that. in the face of what he called "U.S. abuse of tariffs," China has taken "decisive countermeasures" to defend its rights and uphold global trade rules. In response to China's accusations,. U.S. delegate Ting Wu. hit back hard on the spot. Let's read what she said. She said that today's meeting hosted by China. was nothing but a performative stunt. Its premise lacked any substance. and had zero credibility. When assessing China's contribution to the international system,. the world should look at China's actions,. not just its empty words. And in the next line,. she switched to Mandarin. and said:. China says one thing but does another. Their actions don't match their words. For a long time,. China has engaged in unilateral unfair trade practices,. hurting not only the U.S.,. but also global market economies and workers worldwide. China continues to use state subsidies. and other non-market practices. to create overcapacity,. dumping goods and impacting global markets,. squeezing out local economies. Beijing also employs various non-tariff barriers. that hurt farmers and manufacturers worldwide,. including restrictions. on dual-use exports, imposing sanctions,. and conducting antitrust and anti-dumping investigations. Beijing also manipulates international financial institutions,. borrowing money just to lend it out again,. whitewashing its image. while stuffing its pockets. through massive development contracts. China claims to be a developing country,. yet it weaponizes its donor status. and development programs. to bully other developing member states. This situation. cannot continue. President Trump is reshaping the trade environment. to stop China from taking advantage anymore.

We've also witnessed time and again. China's coercive actions in the South China Sea. Remember—. even when China was the rotating president. of the Security Council this February,. talking big about leadership,. it still illegally obstructed. the Philippines' actions near Scarborough Shoal. The U.S. firmly stands with the Philippines. We again condemn. China’s dangerous and unlawful actions in the South China Sea,. and we call on China to comply with the 2016 arbitration ruling. The concept note for this meeting calls. for opposition to all forms of unilateralism and bullying. Here's the key—. therefore, we must emphasize:. China’s misuse of UN General Assembly Resolution 2758. to try to isolate Taiwan,. to distort other countries’ policies,. and to restrict their freedom of choice. This resolution. does not preclude Taiwan’s meaningful participation in the UN system. and other multilateral forums. The U.S. will continue working closely with our allies and partners. to counter Beijing’s attempts. to insert its authoritarian principles. into the UN system. We will also continue defending fair economic competition,. supporting innovation over IP theft,. and supporting free enterprise over authoritarianism. Thank you. After hearing this speech,. it’s just heartwarming. Let me break it down for you. Also, a reminder—. Wu Ting's remarks weren’t made at some obscure side forum. They were made at the UN Security Council,. and at a meeting led by China itself. A direct confrontation. That's extremely rare in diplomatic settings. It shows the U.S. is no longer tolerating. China’s years of exploiting UN procedures. and vague language to pressure other countries. In the past, the CCP kept using Resolution 2758. as a universal excuse to exclude Taiwan. But now things have changed. The U.S. made it clear:. Resolution 2758. only deals with who represents China,. not Taiwan's representation. This is a precise dismantling of the CCP’s rhetoric,. and a strong support. for Taiwan's participation in international organizations. like WHA and ICAO. China keeps claiming to oppose unilateral bullying,. yet it bullies others by occupying exclusive economic zones in the South China Sea,. and obstructs the Philippines.

Just like the Chinese proverb cited—. actions and words don't match. Saying one thing, doing another. Wu Ting was speaking English at first,. but for that sentence, she deliberately switched to Mandarin. I think that’s brilliant. It made her message. even more culturally penetrating,. using language that even Chinese netizens inside the firewall can understand,. and directly slapping the CCP. Leaving the CCP no way to whitewash it. For Taiwan,. this speech isn’t just moral support—. it's a legal and institutional defense,. helping Taiwan gain broader international recognition,. and paving the way for more public support from allies and partners. Honestly—. the CCP is really good at. shooting itself in the foot. They tried to rally other countries to criticize the U.S.,. but no one sided with China. Instead, they got a massive slap in the face,. and even brought more attention. to Taiwan's issue at the UN. Heartwarming! Meanwhile, a U.S. State Department spokesperson. also dismissed China's accusations,. saying bluntly—. this meeting was a waste of Security Council members’ time,. and slammed China's narrative as self-contradictory,. saying that China claims to support open markets,. but at the same time,. dumps artificially low-priced goods onto the global economy,. and steals intellectual property. to gain unfair trade advantages. Meanwhile, U.S. Senator Rick Scott. expressed strong dissatisfaction. with the UN allowing China to hold such a meeting. He posted on Twitter saying—. Let's make this clear:. The U.S. covers 22% of the UN’s annual budget,. and is the biggest financial supporter of countless UN projects. And yet now, the UN is using that money. to host a CCP-led meeting. accusing America of "bullying" them,. just because we finally have. a president who puts America first. That’s ridiculous! (Well, okay, maybe he didn’t say it exactly like that—. I’m just adding a little flair.). We should immediately. stop funding this anti-American UN. This situation also highlights. a longstanding UN problem:. Financially reliant on democracies,. but politically manipulated by authoritarian states. But China’s old tricks aren't working anymore.
